MUSE pairs practical design instances with structured Design Specifications and evaluates generated models through a three-stage protocol: code check, geometric check, and design-intent alignment. The final stage uses design-specific rubrics to assess functionality, manufacturability, and assemblability, moving beyond shape matching toward practical design quality. To enable scalable evaluation, we use a rubric-based visual language model (VLM) judge and validate its reliability through human annotation. Experiments on closed-source and open-source LLMs reveal a clear failure cascade from executable code to valid geometry and finally to engineering-ready design, with even the strongest models achieving limited success on fine-grained engineering criteria. Together, MUSE provides a realistic benchmark and evaluation framework for advancing Text-to-CAD from geometric generation toward true engineering design. Our project website, including the leaderboard, dataset, and code, is available at https://dong7313.github.io/muse-benchmark/.

</details>


### [409] [Satisfiability Solving with LLMs: A Matched-Pair Evaluation of Reasoning Capability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28602)
*Leizhen Zhang,Shuhan Chen,Sheng Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了LLM在2-SAT和3-SAT上的推理能力，发现传统指标（如准确率）具有误导性，并提出了基于配对实例的准确区分率（ADR）作为更可靠的评估方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM越来越多地用于可归结为布尔可满足性（SAT）的任务，但其在SAT上的推理能力尚不明确，且传统评估指标可能产生误导。

Method: 在2-SAT和3-SAT上系统评估LLM，结合Vertex Cover和离散3D装箱两种规范归约，引入配对公式协议和准确区分率（ADR），并测试跨表示一致性。

Result: 传统指标具有误导性：模型倾向于过度预测可满足公式，无法复现3-SAT的"易-难-易"特征，且随变量数增长性能急剧下降。ADR能有效区分基于推理的模型和启发式模型。跨表示一致性超过80%。

Conclusion: SAT是LLM推理的保守探针，配对评估与ADR相比传统指标更忠实且对表示形式更鲁棒。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for tasks that implicitly reduce to Boolean satisfiability (SAT), yet their reasoning ability on SAT remains unclear. We present a systematic study of LLMs on 2-SAT and 3-SAT, together with two canonical reductions, Vertex Cover and discrete 3D packing, to probe representation-invariant reasoning. We first evaluate models using conventional metrics, including accuracy, precision, recall, and F1, as well as the SAT phase-transition setting. We find that these metrics can be misleading: many models obtain high scores by over-predicting satisfiable formulas, fail to reproduce the classical easy-hard-easy signature around the 3-SAT threshold, and degrade sharply as the number of variables grows.
  To address this problem, we introduce a paired-formula protocol based on minimally different satisfiable and unsatisfiable instances, together with Accurate Differentiation Rate (ADR), which requires both members of each pair to be classified correctly. ADR separates reasoning-oriented models from heuristic ones and correlates with witness validity. Beyond CNF, we test cross-representation consistency by converting CNF to Vertex Cover and 3-SAT to discrete 3D packing. Model decisions on CNF and on the corresponding graph or packing instances agree for most models on more than 80 percent of instances, suggesting stable decision rules across representations. Overall, our results show that SAT is a conservative probe for LLM reasoning, and that paired evaluation with ADR provides a more faithful and representation-robust assessment than conventional metrics.

</details>


### [410] [Adaptive Multimodal Agents-Based Framework for Automatic Workflow Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28607)
*Susanna Cifani,Mario Luca Bernardi,Marta Cimitile*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于多模态多智能体的两阶段框架，通过离线构建拓扑知识库和在线自适应RAG+闭环验证机制，实现了复杂工作流的自动执行与动态纠错。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将任务序列视为离散线性片段，无法捕捉底层转移拓扑结构，导致在新场景或非平稳环境中效果有限。

Method: 提出一个多模态多智能体框架，包含两个阶段：1）离线发现阶段，自适应地从碎片化执行日志中构建拓扑知识库；2）推理阶段，利用自适应RAG（基于预构建图）和闭环协作验证协议实现动态自纠正和导航。

Result: 在真实场景中验证，即使训练数据有限，仍能保持高可靠性和语义感知能力。

Conclusion: 基于图的方法在任务分解和自适应导航上优于传统线性序列方法，为智能体在复杂非平稳环境中的工作流执行提供了新思路。

Abstract: Modern information systems require autonomous agents capable of navigating complex workflows, yet current methodologies often struggle with the transition from structured metadata parsing to general environmental perception. While the integration of MLLMs has enabled agents to interact directly with GUIs, existing approaches typically treat task sequences as discrete, linear episodes. This fragmentation prevents agents from capturing the underlying transition topology, limiting their effectiveness in novel or non-stationary scenarios. To address this, we propose a novel multimodal multi-agent framework that achieves automatic workflow execution through a distinct two-phase pipeline. First, during an offline discovery phase, the architecture adaptively constructs a topological knowledge base from fragmented execution logs. During inference, agents leverage Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over this fixed, pre-established graph, coupled with a closed-loop collaborative verification protocol to dynamically self-correct and navigate. This graph-based approach facilitates superior task decomposition and adaptive navigation performance. We validate our framework in a real-world context, demonstrating its ability to maintain high reliability and semantic awareness even with limited training data.

</details>


### [411] [LACUNA: Safe Agents as Recursive Program Holes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28617)
*Yaoyu Zhao,Yichen Xu,Oliver Bračevac,Cao Nguyen Pham,Frank Zhengqing Wu,Martin Odersky*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出LACUNA，一种面向LLM智能体的编程模型，通过让模型编写的代码直接影响运行时（runtime），同时通过类型检查保证安全性。每个智能体动作是类型化调用agent[T](task)，由LLM在运行时填充代码并经过类型检查后才执行，失败动作不会污染环境并支持重试。实验在多个基准上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体中，运行时（runtime）控制循环、上下文和流程，而模型编写的代码只表达单个动作，两者之间存在割裂。让模型代码塑造运行时本身可以增强表达能力，但会加剧安全问题（如提示注入、调用错误工具、部分失败导致不一致状态）。

Method: 提出LACUNA编程模型，核心是agent[T](task)类型化调用：LLM在运行时填充代码，代码在执行前经过类型检查（type-checked），检查通过才执行。动作整体接受或拒绝，拒绝时环境不受影响，编译诊断信息驱动重试。检查机制还约束动作可使用的工具、数据及其流向。该原语可表达ReAct循环、子智能体、技能、并行分解、多模型规划等控制流。

Result: 在BrowseComp-Plus上，8.6%的生成在执行前被拒绝，每次查询平均0.7次重试，准确率达到27.1%。在τ²-bench上，使用强大模型时LACUNA在392个任务（4个领域）中解决了76.0%的任务，与基线智能体持平。

Conclusion: LACUNA成功弥合了智能体运行时与模型编写代码之间的割裂，通过类型检查在不牺牲安全性的前提下增强了智能体的表达能力，并在多个基准测试中验证了有效性。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly act by writing code, yet a split persists between the runtime that drives the agent and the code the model writes. The runtime owns the loop, context, and control flow, and the model has little say over any of them. Letting model-written code shape the runtime itself would make agents more expressive, but it would also sharpen safety problems. A model can be diverted by a prompt injection, call the wrong tool, or fail partway and leave an inconsistent state, and each such failure reaches further when the code shapes the runtime than when it expresses a single action. We present LACUNA, a programming model for agents that closes this split while preserving safety. Each agent action is a typed call $\texttt{agent[T](task)}$ that the LLM fills with code when execution reaches it, and the code is type-checked against the surrounding program before it runs. Because each action is accepted or rejected as a whole, a rejected one leaves the environment untouched, and its compiler diagnostics drive a retry. The same check also bounds which tools and data an action may use and how they flow. Our primitive expresses ReAct loops, sub-agents, skills, parallel decomposition, and multi-model planning as ordinary control flow. We evaluate LACUNA on a collection of test cases, BrowseComp-Plus, and $τ^2$-bench. On BrowseComp-Plus, $8.6\%$ of generations are rejected before execution, with 0.7 retries per query on average, and the agent reaches $27.1\%$ accuracy. On $τ^2$-bench, LACUNA solves $76.0\%$ of $392$ tasks across four domains with a capable model, on par with the baseline agent.

</details>


### [412] [Bandwidth-Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Edge-Cloud Many-to-Many Speech Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28642)
*Yexing Du,Kaiyuan Liu,Youcheng Pan,Bo Yang,Ming Liu,Bing Qin,Yang Xiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ESRT提出了一种隐私保护且带宽高效的边缘-云协同MLLM框架，通过端侧保留轻量级语音编码器、传输高度压缩的中间特征到云端，并结合多任务加权课程学习与数据平衡策略，在45种语言的S2TT任务上达到了SOTA性能，最高减少10倍带宽需求并防止声纹泄露。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM用于语音到文本翻译时面临三大挑战：纯端侧模型受限于资源，纯云端系统传输原始语音导致严重隐私风险和带宽瓶颈，以及大多数模型存在英语中心偏见限制了多对多翻译的扩展。

Method: 1) 设计边缘-云拆分推理架构，端侧仅保留轻量级语音编码器和适配器，传输高度压缩的中间特征而非原始语音；2) 提出多任务加权课程学习策略与数据平衡方法，以克服英语中心瓶颈并确保跨语言一致性。

Result: 在FLEURS数据集上，ESRT-4B和ESRT-12B在45种语言的45×44个翻译方向上达到了SOTA多对多S2TT性能，同时带宽需求降低10倍，并有效防止声纹泄露。

Conclusion: ESRT证明了边缘-云协同架构在兼顾隐私、带宽效率和多语言扩展性方面的有效性，代码和模型已开源以促进可复现的隐私感知MLLM S2TT研究。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated significant potential for speech-to-text translation (S2TT). However, existing deployment paradigms face critical challenges: pure on-device models suffer from resource constraints, while centralized cloud systems incur severe privacy risks and bandwidth bottlenecks by transmitting raw voice data. Furthermore, most models exhibit English-centric biases, restricting many-to-many translation scaling. In this paper, we propose Edge-cloud Speech Recognition and Translation (ESRT), a privacy-preserving and bandwidth-efficient collaborative edge-cloud MLLM framework. Specifically, we design an edge-cloud split inference architecture that retains a lightweight speech encoder and adapter on the device, transmitting only highly compressed intermediate features to the cloud. This fundamentally prevents voiceprint leakage and reduces bandwidth requirements by up to 10$\times$. To overcome English-centric bottlenecks, we introduce a multi-task weighted curriculum learning strategy with data balancing to ensure robust cross-lingual consistency. Extensive experiments on the FLEURS dataset demonstrate that our models, ESRT-4B and ESRT-12B, achieve state-of-the-art many-to-many S2TT performance across 45 languages ($45 \times 44$ directions). Code and models are released to facilitate reproducible, privacy-aware MLLM S2TT research. The code and models are released at https://github.com/yxduir/esrt.

</details>


### [413] [The Ethics of LLM Sandbox and Persona Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28647)
*Tim Gebbie,Stewart Gebbie*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文论证了LLM防护栏和人格动态会制造"现实差距"（reality gap），主动生成这种差距是一种名为"现实洗钱"（reality laundering）的不道德行为，因为它将认知风险转嫁给不知情的用户。作者区分了"拒绝伤害"与"拒绝现实"，主张在任务层面进行因果需求规范，而非在响应层面进行道德修正。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示LLM防护栏和人格动态在看似无害的外表下，实际上通过制造"现实差距"将认知风险转嫁给用户，构成一种隐性的伦理问题。

Method: 通过类比金融监管案例（巴塞尔协议、B-BBEE合规、法兴银行、伦敦鲸事件）论证形式化安全系统的共同缺陷——变得可解读、可博弈、表演性，同时真实风险转移到别处；进而延伸到LLM的"道德合规"现象，区分"拒绝伤害"与"拒绝现实"。

Result: 指出LLM防护栏并非伦理中立的，主动制造现实差距在规模化应用时会构成"现实洗钱"，在高曝光建议场景中危害尤为显著。

Conclusion: 所谓的"伦理AI"当它用制度安抚替代与现实接触时，实质上变得不道德；应当采用自上而下的任务级因果需求规范，而非自下而上的响应级道德修正。

Abstract: It is well known that LLM guardrails and trained persona dynamics can produce a reality gap: the distance between the world a LLM is permitted or shaped to describe, and the world in which users must act. Here we argue that actively generating reality gaps is in fact unethical because it knowingly shifts epistemic risk back to the uninformed user -- this is reality laundering. This can potentially cause harm when operationalised at scale. The risk is sharpest in high-exposure advice contexts, where users seek orientation rather than a bounded, externally checkable task. Guardrails naively appear ethically necessary when they claim to prevent direct harm, but often become suspect when they suppress truthful perception and launder uncomfortable mechanisms into acceptable abstractions. Basel-style financial regulation, B-BBEE-style compliance, Societe Generale, and the London Whale show how formal safety systems can become legible, gameable, and performative while real exposure migrates elsewhere. The same pattern can appear in LLMs as moral compliance: safe language, distorted reality. We therefore distinguish refusing harm, from refusing reality; and then argue for top-down causal requirements specification at the task level rather than bottom-up moral correction at the response or sandbox level. Persona dynamics matter because the assistant interface is not neutral; it shapes how uncertainty, conflict, authority, and risk are staged. The conclusion is that so-called ``ethical AI'' becomes substantively unethical when it substitutes institutional reassurance for contact with reality.

</details>


### [414] [AutoScientists: Self-Organizing Agent Teams for Long-Running Scientific Experimentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28655)
*Shanghua Gao,Ada Fang,Marinka Zitnik*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AutoScientists 是一个去中心化 AI 研究团队系统，通过自组织协作、并行探索和失败知识共享，在生物医学 ML、GPT 训练优化和蛋白质适应度预测等多个领域显著优于现有 AI 研究智能体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 AI 智能体通常遵循单一研究轨迹或通过固定目标的中央规划器协调，无法在长期实验中维持并行探索、适应实验证据变化或保留失败方向的知识。

Method: 提出 AutoScientists，一个去中心化 AI 智能体团队系统。智能体共享实验状态、围绕有前景的假设自组织成团队、在消耗实验计算前批判性评审提案、共享成功和失败以减少冗余探索。

Result: 在 BioML-Bench 上 24 个任务平均排名 74.4%（超最强基线 +8.33%）；GPT 训练优化中目标验证 bits-per-byte 比 Autoresearch 快 1.9 倍；ACE2-Spike 结合预测 Spearman 相关度超 SOTA 12.5%，全 217 种 ProteinGym 检测超 SOTA 6.5%。

Conclusion: 去中心化多智能体协作范式能有效提升长期科学实验的探索效率和发现能力，尤其在需要并行假设验证和知识积累的复杂研究场景中优势显著。

Abstract: Scientific research proceeds through iterative cycles of hypothesis generation, experiment design, execution, and revision. AI agents can automate parts of this process, but existing approaches typically follow a single research trajectory or coordinate through a central planner with fixed objectives. As a result, they struggle to sustain parallel exploration, adapt as experimental evidence changes, or preserve knowledge of failed directions over long-running experiments. We introduce AutoScientists, a decentralized team of AI agents for long-running computational scientific experimentation. Agents interpret a shared experimental state, self-organize into teams around promising hypotheses, critique proposals before using experimental compute, and share successes and failures to reduce redundant exploration. Under matched experimental budgets, AutoScientists improves over prior AI agents across biomedical machine learning, language-model training optimization, and protein fitness prediction. On BioML-Bench, spanning biomedical imaging, protein engineering, single-cell omics, and drug discovery, AutoScientists achieves a mean leaderboard percentile of 74.4% across 24 tasks, improving over the strongest AI agent by +8.33%. On GPT training optimization, AutoScientists reaches a target validation bits-per-byte 1.9x faster than Autoresearch and continues discovering improvements from a starting champion where the single-agent approach finds none (7 vs. 0 accepted improvements). On ProteinGym fitness prediction, AutoScientists discovers a method for ACE2-Spike binding that improves over the current state-of-the-art model by +12.5% in Spearman correlation. Applied without modification across all 217 ProteinGym assays, the same method improves over the prior state of the art by +6.5% (Spearman correlation).

</details>


### [415] [An LLM-Based Assistance System for Intuitive and Flexible Capability-Based Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28666)
*Luis Miguel Vieira da Silva,Nicolas König,Felix Gehlhoff*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合辅助系统，将基于能力的SMT规划方法与LLM结合，通过自然语言交互、解释和适应性修改，提升工业自动化中规划过程的可访问性和可适应性。系统在模块化生产系统上评估，23个测试用例中绝大多数情况表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于能力的规划方法在工业自动化中具有潜力，但存在两个问题：可满足性（SAT）问题难以解释，以及知识模型在操作条件变化时需要调整。现有方法在实用性和可理解性上受限。

Method: 构建混合辅助系统，保留符号规划器（SMT）的正式规划正确性，增加LLM层处理自然语言交互、解释和知识模型自适应修改（需人工在环批准）。系统包括四个组件：能力基础化、符号规划、结果解释、规划自适应，通过路由代理工作流实现。

Result: 在23个测试用例中，9/10的知识查询和所有4个可满足规划案例处理正确；3/4的不可满足案例生成了具体修复建议；所有5个自适应规划场景通过用户批准的模型修改最终得到可满足方案。

Conclusion: 将正式规划与LLM辅助相结合，能显著提升工业自动化中规划方法的可访问性和可适应性。

Abstract: In modern industry, dynamic environments and the complexity of modular and reconfigurable resources require automated planning of process sequences. Capability-based planning approaches address this by automatically generating plans from semantic knowledge models that describe resource functions in a machine-interpretable form. Their practical use, however, remains limited: solver feedback, especially in the case of unsatisfiability, is difficult to interpret, and the knowledge models require adaptation as operational conditions change or requests become infeasible. This paper presents a hybrid assistance system that augments an existing capability-based Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) planning approach with an Large Language Model (LLM)-based layer for natural-language interaction, explanation, and adaptation. Formal planning correctness remains with the symbolic planner, while the LLM layer handles natural-language access and flexible knowledge model adaptation under explicit Human-in-the-Loop (HitL) approval. The system decomposes into four components: Capability Grounding, Symbolic Planning, Result Interpretation, and Planning Adaptation, realized as a routed agentic workflow in which a central router delegates to five specialized agents. The system is evaluated on a modular production system across four scenario types. Of 23 test cases, 9 of 10 knowledge queries and all 4 satisfiable planning cases were handled correctly, 3 of 4 unsatisfiable cases produced concrete repair proposals, and all 5 adaptive planning scenarios resolved into satisfiable plans through iterative, user-approved knowledge model modifications. The findings confirm that combining formal planning with LLM-based assistance substantially improves accessibility and adaptability in industrial automation.

</details>


### [416] [DREAM-R: Multimodal Speculative Reasoning with RL-Based Refined Drafting, Precise Verification, and Fully Parallel Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28678)
*Yunhai Hu,Zining Liu,Xiangyang Yin,Tianhua Xia,Bo Bao,Eric Sather,Vithursan Thangarasa,Sai Qian Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DREAM-R框架，通过SAPO强化学习目标和TBVM阈值验证机制，结合FPSR并行推理框架，在保持推理质量的同时实现推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推测推理（speculative reasoning）方法在大型多模态模型中存在推测草稿与目标验证推理之间的对齐不足问题，导致加速效果受限。

Method: 1）SAPO（推测对齐策略优化）：使用强化学习训练草稿模型生成既忠实于目标轨迹又简洁的推理步骤；2）TBVM（基于阈值的验证机制）：采用比率判据稳定且可解释地接受推测步骤，防止错误传播；3）FPSR（全并行推测推理）：并行化草稿生成、目标推理和验证，支持早停和干净回退。

Result: 在推理密集型基准测试上实现了最高可达数倍的加速比，同时保持目标模型的准确性，在不牺牲推理质量的前提下显著提升效率。

Conclusion: DREAM-R框架通过对齐优化、阈值验证和并行化设计，有效解决了推测推理中的对齐问题，实现了高效且可靠的推理加速。

Abstract: Speculative reasoning has recently been proposed as a means to accelerate reasoning-intensive generation in large multimodal models, but its effectiveness is often constrained by misalignment between speculative drafts and target-verified reasoning. In this work, we introduce DREAM-R, a framework that substantially improves the performance of speculative reasoning. At its core, DREAM-R employs Speculative Alignment Policy Optimization (SAPO), a reinforcement-learning objective that trains draft models to generate reasoning steps that are both faithful to target trajectories and concise. We further propose a Threshold-based Verification Mechanism (TBVM) that uses a ratio-based criterion to provide stable and interpretable acceptance of speculative steps only when positive evidence clearly dominates, thereby preventing error propagation. Building on these components, we develop a Fully Parallel Speculative Reasoning (FPSR) framework that parallelizes draft generation, target-side reasoning, and verification across multi-step reasoning, enabling early stopping and clean fallback. Experiments on reasoning-heavy benchmarks demonstrate up to speedup while preserving target-model accuracy, yielding substantial efficiency gains without compromising reasoning quality.

</details>


### [417] [VeriTrip: A Verifiable Benchmark for Travel Planning Agents over Unstructured Web Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28683)
*Yuting Xu,Jiayi Tian,Jian Liang,Xin Xiong,Hang Zhang,Mu Xu,Xiao-Yu Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VeriTrip是一个面向开放网络环境的多模态旅行规划基准，通过多模态检索库和可验证知识库的细胞级验证协议，揭示了大模型在自主检索与推理之间存在显著的权衡关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准停留在API执行层面，忽略了开放网络环境中的信息噪音、多源事实矛盾以及视觉感知与逻辑规划之间的割裂，无法满足自主智能体对鲁棒性和可靠性的更高要求。

Method: 构建多模态检索库(MRB)和可验证知识库(VKB)，采用细胞级验证协议精准量化事实可靠性，区分系统性推理失败与参数化幻觉。

Result: 在多个主流MLLM上的评估揭示了"检索-推理权衡"：自主检索带来的认知负荷显著削弱了指令保持能力。

Conclusion: VeriTrip为下一代能在无约束多模态环境中运行的规划智能体提供了更严格的评估基础。

Abstract: Existing benchmarks have laid the foundation for travel planning agents by establishing API-centric paradigms. However, as the capabilities of Autonomous Agents continue to advance, their evaluation must evolve beyond simple tool execution toward handling the inherent complexities of the open web. Current benchmarks bypass core cognitive hurdles: they fail to account for information noise, ignore multi-source factual contradictions, and overlook the necessity of grounding visual perception into logical planning. We introduce VeriTrip, a verifiable benchmark designed to meet the increasing demands for agent robustness and reliability. VeriTrip shifts the evaluation focus to evidence-grounded reasoning over unstructured multimodal web corpora. It establishes a Multimodal Retrieval Base (MRB) derived from real-world sources, forcing agents to autonomously orchestrate queries across heterogeneous data. A synchronized Verifiable Knowledge Base (VKB) enables a cell-wise verification protocol that precisely quantifies factual reliability, distinguishing systematic reasoning failures from parametric hallucinations. Our evaluations across leading MLLMs reveal a critical \textit{retrieval-reasoning trade-off}: the cognitive load of autonomous retrieval significantly erodes instruction retention. VeriTrip provides the rigorous foundation necessary for the next generation of planning agents capable of operating in unconstrained, multimodal environments.

</details>


### [418] [TRACER: Turn-level Regret Matching with Inner Reinforcement Credit for Cooperative Multi-LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28699)
*Chusen Li,Zhou Liu,Shuigeng Zhou,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TRACER是一个用于多LLM协作推理的回合级强化学习框架，通过将决策分解为控制器-遗憾层（学习何时发言）和生成-信用层（学习说什么），采用遗憾匹配和GSPO奖励来解决稀疏奖励、搭便车和固定协议震荡问题，在GSM8K等基准上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的强化学习与多智能体提示两种范式难以结合，直接将单智能体强化学习应用于多轮多智能体系统面临三大困境：稀疏奖励与角色级搭便车问题、智能体仅模仿协作而非真正学习、固定协作协议容易陷入震荡的局部最优。

Method: TRACER将协作决策分解为两层：1) 控制器-遗憾层（Controller-Regret Layer）：控制器通过遗憾匹配（regret matching）学习智能体在当前回合应该发言还是跳过，将动作空间压缩为二元选择降低训练成本；2) 生成-信用层（Generation-Credit Layer）：使用角色特定的GSPO奖励优化提议者（proposer）和评审者（reviewer）的生成话语。通过将经典博弈论扩展至深度学习领域，实现数学上严格的收敛保证。

Result: 在GSM8K训练集上训练，在保留的GSM8K、MATH500和GPQA-Diamond上评估，测量了域内准确率、跨基准泛化能力、推理成本和纠错保持行为。框架提供了比固定辩论、投票或聚合协议更加紧凑和可复现的测试平台。

Conclusion: TRACER通过回合级强化框架成功结合了强化学习与多智能体协作推理，解决了稀疏奖励、搭便车和固定协议震荡问题，代码已开源。

Abstract: Large language models increasingly rely on either reinforcement learning or multi-agent prompting to improve reasoning, yet these two paradigms remain difficult to combine. Directly applying single-agent reinforcement learning to multi-turn multi-agent systems faces following dilemmas: i) Sparse rewards, role-level free-riding and excessive training overhead. ii) Agents only imitate to collaborate. iii) Fixed collaboration protocol falls into oscillating local optimum. We introduce TRACER, a turn-level reinforcement framework for cooperative multi-LLM reasoning. TRACER separates collaborative decision making into a controller-regret layer, where controllers learn whether the agents should speak or skip the current round through regret matching, and a generation-credit layer, which optimizes proposer and reviewer utterances with role-specific GSPO rewards. This design i) assigns credit at the level of both action modes and generated utterances, thus avoiding free-riding and sparse rewards. We only expand the choices made by the controllers, thus greatly reducing computational cost of training. Moreover, ii) agents acquire collaborative capability as they learn when to utter and what to speak. Finally, iii) by designing binary actions ingeniously, we extend classical game theory established for finite action spaces to deep learning, thus achieving mathematically rigorous convergence. We train all local RL-style methods on the GSM8K training split and evaluate on held-out GSM8K, MATH500, and GPQA-Diamond to measure in-domain accuracy, cross-benchmark generalization, inference cost, and correction-preservation behavior. The resulting framework provides a compact and reproducible testbed for studying learned collaboration policies beyond fixed debate, voting, or aggregation protocols. Code is available at https://github.com/Shark-Forest/TRACER.

</details>


### [419] [The Importance of Being Statistically Earnest: A Critical Re-evaluation of GSM-Symbolic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28700)
*Dominika Agnieszka Długosz,Arlindo Oliveira,Natalia Díaz Rodríguez*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文对GSM-Symbolic基准测试的结论提出质疑，通过更严谨的统计方法（广义线性混合模型）重新分析20个开源模型，发现仅半数模型存在显著性能变化，并揭示了数据集中数字分布偏差这一未控制因素。作者认为，关于LLM推理能力的笼统结论在统计上不成熟，在机制上具有误导性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑GSM-Symbolic基准测试声称"LLM缺乏真正推理能力"的结论，指出其统计基础薄弱。

Method: 使用广义线性混合模型（GLMM）并引入每问题随机效应，对20个开源模型进行重新评估；同时通过K-S检验分析GSM-Symbolic与GSM-Base数据集中整数的分布差异。

Result: 仅50%的模型在原始提示格式下表现出显著性能变化；GSM-Symbolic数据集中大整数分布显著偏移（K-S统计量=0.12, p<0.001），控制该因素后可解释约半数剩余案例的显著性；存在模型特定的不同失败模式（变量绑定脆弱性、算术限制、双任务干扰）。

Conclusion: 笼统地声称LLM缺乏推理能力在统计上不成熟、在机制上具有误导性，应关注模型特定的失败模式而非一刀切的结论。

Abstract: The GSM-Symbolic benchmark (Mirzadeh et al., 2025) reported consistent performance drops across 25 Large Language Models (LLMs) when tested on template-generated variants of GSM8K problems, concluding that the models lack genuine reasoning capabilities. We argue that this conclusion rests on shaky statistical ground. Re-evaluating 20 open-weight models using Generalised Linear Mixed Models with per-question random effects, we find that only half exhibit statistically significant performance changes under the original prompt format. Moreover, we identify a previously unacknowledged factor: the main GSM-Symbolic dataset contains a systematically shifted distribution of larger integers in problem texts relative to GSM-Base (K-S statistic = 0.12, p < 0.001), contradicting the original authors' claims. Controlling for this large number effect accounts for significance in roughly half the remaining cases. Among models with statistically significant performance deltas, we identify distinct, model-specific failure profiles - including fragility of variable binding, arithmetic limitations, and dual-task interference - underscoring that blanket claims about LLM reasoning are both statistically premature and mechanistically misleading.

</details>


### [420] [Beyond Binary Moral Judgment: Modeling Ethical Pluralism in AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28707)
*Aisha Aijaz,Rahul Goel,Arnav Batra,Raghava Mutharaju*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种将道德推理建模为规范化伦理理论分布（伦理多元主义）的框架，通过两流规范-语义架构和堆叠集成学习，在450个案例上实现了88.89%的准确率，支持类人道德推理和AI对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI道德决策方法多采用标量或二元判断，缺乏解释性且忽略关键上下文和理论信息，难以支持问责制。需要更丰富的道德推理模型。

Method: 提出规范伦理单纯形（normative ethics simplex）整合三种主流理论（后果主义、德性伦理、义务论）及15个子类别；构建两流规范-语义架构，融合上下文特征与语义嵌入；采用顺序堆叠集成学习渐进学习粒度。

Result: 集成上下文与规范化先验信息后分类准确率达88.89%；消融实验表明结构化伦理表示优于类比推理，堆叠架构因渐进学习粒度而效果最佳；通过熵、置信度和可视化分析伦理多元主义。

Conclusion: 建模为概率性规范伦理分布的伦理多元主义有助于实现类人道德推理、分析伦理分歧以及未来AI系统的对齐。

Abstract: Critical decision-making in socially consequential spaces is increasingly involving AI systems at varying capacities. Yet, despite the ubiquity of autonomous systems, most approaches to handling autonomous moral decision-making resort to scalar or binary judgments. These methods are insufficient for acceptable moral reasoning, as they provide little explanation, leaving out imperative contextual and theoretical information that must be included to support accountability. For this, we propose a framework to model moral reasoning as a distribution over normative ethical theories or ethical pluralism. We introduce a normative ethics simplex that integrates these theories. A benchmark of 450 cases across 15 fine-grained subtheories was also prepared for the purposes of stacked ensemble learning. These cases describe ethical dilemmas in natural language and have associated extracted contextual features. The implementation of the simplex was achieved via a two-stream normative-semantic architecture. This is followed by the fusion of normative information and a sequential, stacking ensemble to learn the best fit of the three broad theories: consequentialism, virtue ethics, and deontology, and the 15 subcategories. Our experiments demonstrate that the integration of contextual and normative priors with the semantic embeddings significantly improves the performance of the classification, displaying an accuracy of 88.89%. We conducted ablation studies to show that structured ethical representations contribute beyond analogical reasoning, and the chosen stacking architecture gives the best results due to the gradual learning of granularity. Ethical pluralism is also analyzed through entropy, confidence, and visualization. Thus, modeling ethical pluralism as a probabilistic normative distribution supports human-like moral reasoning, ethical disagreement analysis, and future alignment in AI systems.

</details>


### [421] [Thinking as Compression: Your Reasoning Model is Secretly a Context Compressor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28713)
*Guoxin Ma,Yibing Liu,Chengzhengxu Li,Yu Liang,Yan Wang,Yueyang Zhang,Kecheng Chen,Zhaohan Zhang,Zhiyuan Sun,Daiting Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Thinking as Compression (TaC)范式，直接利用思维模型的思考过程作为压缩上下文，无需专用压缩模块；进一步通过奖励驱动优化框架TaC-C实现可控压缩，在长上下文QA基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文压缩方法依赖复杂模块或专用训练，忽视了LLM自身的内禀压缩能力。作者旨在探索思维模型能否通过自身推理过程自然压缩长上下文。

Method: 1) TaC：直接提示思维模型生成思维痕迹作为压缩上下文；2) TaC-C：引入奖励驱动优化框架，对思维过程施加约束，使其更紧凑、可控。

Result: 在4倍压缩下，TaC-C在F1和EM上分别超过最强基线17.4%和15.7%；8倍压缩下分别超过23.4%和21.7%。

Conclusion: 思维模型的内禀推理能力可以有效用于上下文压缩，通过简单优化即可实现优于复杂专用方法的效果，为压缩范式提供了新思路。

Abstract: Context compression aims to shorten long context inputs with minimal information loss for LLM inference acceleration. While existing methods have shown promise, they typically rely on complex compression modules or compression-specific training, leaving the intrinsic capabilities of LLMs underexplored. In contrast, this work reveals that a thinking model itself can naturally compress long contexts by organizing task-relevant information. We thus derive Thinking as Compression (TaC), a new compression paradigm that treats thinking itself as compressed context. Without relying on specific dedicated compressor, TaC directly prompts the thinking model to generate thinking traces as the shortened context, already outperforming most representative compression methods. Further, given that raw thinking output may struggle with budget control and shortcut behaviors, we introduce Thinking as Compression Constrained (TaC-C), leveraging a simple reward-driven optimization framework to elicit intrinsic thinking as compact and controllable compressed context. Experiments across four long-context QA benchmarks demonstrate that TaC-C consistently outperforms existing baselines. At 4x and 8x compression ratios, it surpasses the strongest competitor by 17.4% and 23.4% in average F1, and by 15.7% and 21.7% in average Exact Match Score (EM), respectively.

</details>


### [422] [OpenURMA: A Clean-Room Open Implementation of the Unified Bus Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28717)
*Bojie Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出OpenURMA——首个基于华为UB协议栈的开源实现，通过改进的传输抽象（解耦端点状态、可选排序、原生访存）在FPGA上实现500ns远程内存访问，相比RoCEv2延迟降低4.37倍，吞吐量提升2.80倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代数据中心RDMA的瓶颈在网络接口而非线缆：RoCE/InfiniBand维护每连接状态（1024应用扇出时需数百MB），且64字节操作需要四次PCIe往返，延迟远超线路本身。根本原因在于RDMA继承自InfiniBand的"Queue Pair over PCIe"抽象。

Method: 基于华为UB 2025公开规范，解耦每应用端点状态与每主机传输状态，使连接上下文按加法增长；将排序机制变为可选项；通过片上总线控制器实现原生CPU load/store远程内存访问。OpenURMA在三个层次实现：可综合RTL（Alveo U50）、周期级SystemC双节点模拟器、gem5全系统框架，并配置匹配的OpenRoCE基线用于公平对比。

Result: 64字节远程取操作（UB的LOAD vs RoCEv2 RC的READ）：端到端延迟约500ns，比基线（2186ns）低4.37倍；吞吐量提升2.80倍；逻辑资源仅消耗U50约14%的LUT。

Conclusion: 通过改变传输抽象层设计，UB协议栈能显著降低RDMA远程内存访问的延迟和资源开销，OpenURMA作为开源实现验证了这一方案的可行性，并为封闭商用硅片无法进行的对比分析提供了研究平台。

Abstract: Modern datacenter RDMA is bottlenecked at the network interface, not the wire. A NIC running RoCE or InfiniBand holds per-connection state for every (application, remote-endpoint) pair - hundreds of megabytes at 1024-application fanout - and pays a four-traversal PCIe round trip on a 64-byte operation, inflating latency an order of magnitude beyond the wire. Both follow from the Queue Pair over PCIe abstraction RDMA inherits from InfiniBand.
  Huawei's Unified Bus (UB), a public 2025 specification, changes the abstraction: it decouples per-application endpoint state from per-host transport state so connection context grows additively, exposes ordering as opt-in, and reaches remote memory through native CPU load/store to an on-chip-bus controller. UB ships in Huawei's closed Ascend 950 silicon.
  OpenURMA is the first clean-room open implementation of UB's transport and transaction layers, realised at three tiers - synthesisable RTL on Alveo U50, a cycle-level two-node SystemC simulator, and a gem5 full-system scaffold - each with a matched OpenRoCE (RoCEv2 RC) baseline. The contribution is the implementation, harness, and controlled comparison closed silicon does not admit. On the canonical 64-byte remote fetch - LOAD on UB-spec Sec.8.3, READ on RoCEv2 RC - UB's load/store path delivers ~500 ns end-to-end, 4.37x below the matched baseline (2186 ns), sustains 2.80x higher throughput, and fits in ~14% of a U50's LUTs.

</details>


### [423] [LiveBrowseComp: Are Search Agents Searching, or Just Verifying What They Already Know?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28721)
*HuiMing Fan,Xiao Wang,Zheng Chu,Qianyu Wang,Zhuoyao Wang,Ming Liu,Bing Qin,XingYu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文发现LLM搜索代理在BrowseComp基准测试中存在“内在知识依赖”（IKD）：即使能使用搜索工具，模型也更依赖预训练记忆而非外部证据。为解决此问题，作者构建了LiveBrowseComp——包含335个依赖近期发布事实的问题，所有现有模型在该基准上闭卷准确率低于2%，搜索增强性能比BrowseComp下降25-40分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有搜索基准（如BrowseComp）可能混淆了模型“已知的知识”与“能找到的知识”，无法区分基于记忆的验证与真正的证据驱动搜索。作者希望通过诊断IKD现象并构建新的基准来推动搜索代理朝着真正的证据驱动推理发展。

Method: 1）提出三项诊断分析IKD：无工具回答率、搜索查询来源（内部假设 vs 检索线索）、移除证据后的性能对比。2）构建LiveBrowseComp：335个问题，答案依赖发布后90天内的新信息，排除全球热点事件，覆盖6个更新源。3）在多个模型上评测闭卷与搜索增强性能。

Result: 1）BrowseComp上模型无工具回答率高达44.5%，超半数搜索查询来自内部假设而非检索线索。2）移除证据后模型表现劣于闭卷基线。3）LiveBrowseComp上所有模型闭卷准确率<2%，搜索增强分数比BrowseComp低25-40分，模型排名不再一致。

Conclusion: 静态搜索基准存在严重的IKD问题，无法反映真正的搜索能力。LiveBrowseComp通过控制知识时效性和排除热点事件，能更可靠地评估代理进行证据驱动的深度搜索能力，现有模型在该基准上表现极差，说明仍需大量改进。

Abstract: Are LLM-based search agents genuinely searching, or using the web to verify what they already know? We study this question on BrowseComp with three diagnostics. Our analysis reveals Intrinsic Knowledge Dependence (IKD): even with tool access, agents often rely on intrinsic knowledge -- information encoded in the model before retrieval -- rather than on external evidence. Agents answer up to 44.5% of BrowseComp questions without tools, generate more than half of their search queries from internally produced hypotheses rather than retrieved leads, and perform worse than closed-book baselines when answer-supporting evidence is removed. These results suggest that static search benchmarks can reward memory-backed verification rather than evidence-driven discovery, conflating what agents already know with what they can find. We then introduce LiveBrowseComp, a deep-search benchmark designed to evaluate agents beyond intrinsic coverage. It contains 335 human-authored questions whose answers depend on facts published within the 90 days preceding benchmark construction, drawn from six updated sources and filtered to exclude globally salient events. On LiveBrowseComp, all evaluated agents fall below 2% closed-book accuracy, search-augmented scores drop by 25-40 points relative to BrowseComp, and prior model rankings no longer reliably predict performance. LiveBrowseComp is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Forival/LiveBrowseComp.

</details>


### [424] [Multi-Adapter Representation Interventions via Energy Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28722)
*Manjiang Yu,Hongji Li,Junwei Chen,Xue Li,Priyanka Singh,Yang Cao,Lijie Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MARI方法，通过多适配器竞争机制和能量校准门控模块，自适应地调整表征干预的方向和强度，在保持通用能力的同时实现更好的对齐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表征干预方法对所有输入使用统一的固定干预，但不同样本所需的干预方向和强度差异很大，这种无差别干预会损害良性输入的通用能力。

Method: 提出MARI框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 竞争性多适配器机制，每个适配器为不同样本自适应地学习非线性的干预方向和强度；(2) 基于能量的门控模块，利用内部传播动力学区分哪些输入适合进行干预。

Result: 在TruthfulQA、BBQ和安全性基准上达到SOTA对齐性能，同时在MMLU和ARC等通用任务上保持甚至提升原有能力。

Conclusion: MARI通过自适应、样本级别的表征干预，有效解决了统一干预带来的通用能力退化问题，在多种模型家族和参数规模下均验证了其有效性。

Abstract: Representation intervention has emerged as a promising paradigm for aligning large language models toward desired behaviors without modifying model weights. Existing methods typically apply a fixed intervention uniformly across all inputs. However, we find that the appropriate intervention direction and strength vary substantially across samples, and such indiscriminate intervention leads to degradation of general capabilities on benign inputs. To address these challenges, we propose Multi-Adapter Representation Interventions via Energy Calibration (MARI). Specifically, we introduce a competitive multi-adapter mechanism in which specialized experts capture non-linear correction patterns and adaptively determine the appropriate intervention direction and strength for different samples. Furthermore, we design an energy-based gating module that leverages internal propagation dynamics to distinguish inputs that are applicable for intervention. Extensive experiments across diverse model families and parameter scales demonstrate that MARI achieves state-of-the-art alignment performance. Our method significantly improves performance on TruthfulQA, BBQ, and safety benchmarks, while maintaining and even improving general capabilities on tasks such as MMLU and ARC. Our code is available at https://github.com/V1centNevwake/MARI.

</details>


### [425] [AlphaTransit: Learning to Design City-scale Transit Routes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28730)
*Bibek Poudel,Sai Swaminathan,Weizi Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AlphaTransit 是一个结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与神经策略-价值网络的公交网络规划框架，通过决策时前瞻指导路线扩展，在Bloomington基准上实现最高服务率（54.6%和82.1%），分别比纯强化学习和纯MCTS提升9.9%/11.4%和2.5%/11.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公交网络设计中存在延迟反馈问题：路线扩展的局部效果良好，但只有完整网络建成后才能评估其全局质量，路线间存在欺骗性交互（如转移瓶颈、冗余重叠、吞吐量下降）。

Method: AlphaTransit 将 MCTS 与神经策略-价值网络结合：策略网络（policy）提出路线扩展建议，价值网络（value）评估下游设计质量，搜索过程利用这些预测优化每个决策，在不运行仿真rollout的情况下实现决策时前瞻。

Result: 在Bloomington网络混合需求场景服务率达54.6%，完全公交需求场景达82.1%。相比无搜索的强化学习分别提升9.9%和11.4%，相比无学习指导的MCTS分别提升2.5%和11.2%。

Conclusion: 将学习指导与MCTS结合比单独使用任一方法对公交网络设计更有效，代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Designing a transit network requires many sequential route extension decisions, but their quality is often visible only after the full network is assembled. This delayed-feedback challenge lies at the heart of the Transit Route Network Design Problem (TRNDP), where route interactions can be deceptive: an extension that appears useful locally can create transfer bottlenecks, produce redundant overlap, or reduce overall throughput. To guide route construction under delayed simulator feedback, we introduce AlphaTransit, a search-based planning framework for cityscale bus network design. AlphaTransit couples Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a neural policy-value network: the policy proposes route extensions, the value estimates downstream design quality, and search uses these predictions to refine each decision. This provides decision-time lookahead during route construction without running simulator rollouts inside the search tree. We evaluate AlphaTransit on a new Bloomington TRNDP benchmark with realistic road topology and censusderived demand, under mixed and full transit demand settings. In the Bloomington network, AlphaTransit attains the highest service rate in both demand settings, reaching 54.6% and 82.1%, respectively. Relative to reinforcement learning without search, these correspond to 9.9% and 11.4% service rate gains; relative to MCTS without learned guidance, they correspond to 2.5% and 11.2% gains. These results suggest that coupling learned guidance with MCTS is more effective than using either approach alone for transit network design. Our code and data are publicly available in https://github.com/poudel-bibek/AlphaTransit.

</details>


### [426] [Utility-Aware Multimodal Contrastive Learning for Product Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28733)
*Xiaohang Feng,Yiling Xie*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种效用感知的多模态对比学习框架，通过Utility-Aware InfoNCE损失函数将消费者需求融入图像生成，使生成的产品图像既语义一致又能提升需求，在Amazon和Airbnb数据集上优于现有模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式AI模型仅关注文本-图像的语义对齐，但语义对齐并不保证图像能促进销售，缺乏直接优化市场表现的机制。

Method: 提出Utility-Aware InfoNCE损失函数，将消费者需求信号融入多模态对比学习框架，引导图像-文本表示空间向需求驱动的视觉线索偏移。

Result: 在Amazon和Airbnb数据集上，生成和编辑的产品图像在提升需求、保持保真度和文本-图像一致性方面均优于SOTA模型；人类实验验证了商业有效性；保留了属性（如美学、独特性）的倒U型需求模式。

Conclusion: 该效用感知框架可灵活嵌入新兴生成模型，提升直接商业应用价值。

Abstract: Product images strongly influence consumer decision-making in online marketplaces. Empowered by multimodal contrastive learning, generative AI can output images that closely align with text prompts. Yet existing generative AI models do not directly optimize marketplace performance. This is a critical gap, since semantic alignment alone does not guarantee that an image will sell. To address this limitation, we propose a \textit{utility-aware multimodal contrastive learning} framework that incorporates consumer demand into a novel Utility-Aware InfoNCE loss. Optimizing this utility-aware objective guides generation toward images that are both semantically coherent and demand-enhancing. This effect arises directly from a shift in the learned image-text representation space toward demand-driven visual cues, which we also validate through the theoretical bound of the proposed objective. In downstream applications on Amazon and Airbnb, product images generated and edited by our method outperform state-of-the-art models in increasing demand and preserving fidelity, while maintaining text-image consistency. Notably, our utility-aware framework preserves inverse U-shaped demand patterns for attributes such as aesthetics and uniqueness, improving demand-based performance while preserving fidelity and semantic consistency. Human-subject experiments further validate its commercial effectiveness. As generative AI technology continues to evolve, our utility-aware component can be flexibly embedded into emerging generative models to improve direct commercial use.

</details>


### [427] [CORE: Contrastive Reflection Enables Rapid Improvements in Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28742)
*Linas Nasvytis,Simon Jerome Han,Ben Prystawski,Satchel Grant,Noah D. Goodman,Judith E. Fan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出对比反思（CORE）算法，通过比较成功与失败推理轨迹生成自然语言洞察，实现了比参数方法（RLVR、GRPO）和非参数方法（GEPA、RAG、MemRL）更高效、更可解释的模型自我改进，且仅需少量训练样本和 rollout。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的推理能力提升方法（参数化如RLVR、非参数化如提示优化）通常需要数百个训练样本和数千次模型rollout，成本高昂甚至难以实现。作者旨在解决这一效率瓶颈。

Method: 提出对比反思（CORE）非参数学习算法：通过对比成功与失败推理轨迹之间的差异，生成简洁的自然语言洞察（推理策略与约束），无需参数更新或直接复用轨迹。

Result: 在四个推理任务上，CORE比GRPO（参数化）和GEPA、RAG、MemRL（非参数化）方法提升更快，且使用更少rollout；在固定预算下仅需5个训练样本即可达到可比或更优性能；同时比非参数基线更具上下文效率（更少提示词token）。

Conclusion: 将成功与失败推理轨迹之间的对比蒸馏为抽象、有用的自然语言洞察，是比权重更新、提示优化或直接复用轨迹更高效且更可解释的模型自我改进路径。

Abstract: Language models can use verifiable rewards to improve at a wide variety of reasoning tasks. However, both parametric (e.g. RLVR) and non-parametric (e.g. prompt optimization) approaches to doing so typically require hundreds of training samples and thousands of model rollouts, making them expensive in the best case and intractable in the worst. To address this challenge, we introduce Contrastive Reflection (CORE), a non-parametric learning algorithm that compares past reasoning traces to generate insights: short natural-language descriptions of reasoning strategies and constraints that capture differences between successful and unsuccessful problem attempts. Across four reasoning tasks, we demonstrate that CORE enables more rapid improvement than both parametric (GRPO) and non-parametric (GEPA, episodic RAG, and MemRL) methods, while using fewer rollouts. Under fixed rollout budgets with as few as five training samples, we then show that CORE also achieves comparable or greater performance gains than each baseline. Finally, we highlight how CORE is also substantially more context-efficient than non-parametric baselines, requiring fewer prompt tokens while storing learned knowledge as compact, interpretable natural-language insights. Our results therefore suggest that distilling contrasts between successful and unsuccessful reasoning traces into abstract and useful insights can provide a more efficient and interpretable route to model self-improvement than weight updates, prompt optimization, or direct reuse of stored reasoning traces.

</details>


### [428] [CubePart: An Open-Vocabulary Part-Controllable 3D Generator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28763)
*Yiheng Zhu,Kangle Deng,Jean-Philippe Fauconnier,Inaki Navarro,Daiqing Li,Ava Pun,Yinan Zhang,Peiye Zhuang,Xiaoxia Sun,Maneesh Agrawala,Kiran Bhat,Tinghui Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CubePart提出了一种开放词汇、零件可控的3D网格生成框架，能够根据文本提示和用户定义的零件方案生成结构化的3D资产，可直接用于游戏引擎和动画脚本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D生成模型通常生成整体网格或任意零件拆分，无法与应用特定的语义零件结构对齐，而游戏和仿真中的3D资产需要按语义零件分解以支持动画、物理和脚本行为。

Method: 提出可扩展的数据管道构建开放词汇、带零件标签的3D数据集；设计两阶段生成架构，将全局形状合成与零件级解码分离；将零件结构作为推理时的显式控制信号。

Result: 生成的3D资产可以直接集成到游戏引擎中，由动画和行为脚本驱动，无需手动后处理。

Conclusion: CubePart实现了开放词汇、零件可控的3D网格生成，有效满足了游戏和仿真中对结构化3D资产的特定需求。

Abstract: Interactive 3D assets used in games and simulation are typically decomposed into specific semantic parts to support animation, physics, and scripted behaviors, yet most generative 3D models produce either monolithic meshes or arbitrary part decompositions that cannot be aligned with application-specific requirements. We present CubePart, a generative framework for open-vocabulary, part-controllable 3D mesh generation that exposes part structure as an explicit inference-time control signal. Given a global text prompt and a user-defined parts schema expressed as an open-ended list of part names, our method generates a set of meshes - one per schema element - that assemble into a coherent object while respecting the specified semantic structure. To enable this capability, we introduce a scalable data pipeline to construct a large open-vocabulary, part-labeled 3D dataset, along with a two-stage generative architecture that separates global shape synthesis from part-level decoding. We demonstrate that the resulting assets can be directly integrated into game engines and driven by animation and behavior scripts without manual post-processing. Project Page: https://cubepart.github.io/

</details>


### [429] [SwarmHarness: Skill-Based Task Routing via Decentralized Incentive-Aligned AI Agent Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28764)
*Edwin Jose*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SwarmHarness是一个去中心化的计算共享协议，通过DHT发现、效用路由和Shapley值信用机制，让闲置GPU所有者无需中央权威即可安全、自利地共享计算资源，并展现出类似生物群体的涌现智能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大量计算资源（个人工作站、空闲推理服务器、边缘设备）因缺乏激励对齐的共享协议而闲置，现有方案依赖中央协调器（云市场）、重区块链基础设施（Golem）或缺乏激励层（BOINC），亟需一种去中心化、激励兼容的计算共享协议。

Method: SwarmHarness包含三个组件：1) SwarmRegistry——基于分布式哈希表(DHT)的对等发现和能力公告；2) SwarmRouter——基于能力、负载、延迟和信任的效用函数分发任务；3) SwarmCredit——通过Shapley值近似分配计算积分，形成自我调节的参与经济，闲置节点积分耗尽后失去路由优先级。

Result: 节点通过服务任务赚取积分、提交任务消耗积分，闲置节点积分耗尽后失去路由优先级，形成自我调节的参与经济；节点向高奖励技能专业化，路由信号充当数字信息素，网络展现出类似生物群体的涌现集体智能。

Conclusion: SwarmHarness不仅是计算共享协议，更是自主分布式AI代理网络的基础原语，使代理无需人类中介即可雇佣计算、路由子任务和结算积分。

Abstract: Vast quantities of compute (GPU cycles on personal workstations, idle inference servers, and edge devices between jobs) go unused because no incentive-aligned protocol exists for their owners to share them safely and profitably. Existing approaches either require a trusted central coordinator (cloud marketplaces), demand heavy blockchain infrastructure (Golem, BrokerChain), or lack an incentive layer entirely (BOINC, Petals). We propose SwarmHarness, a decentralised protocol in which HarnessAPI skill nodes self-organise into a compute swarm without any central authority. SwarmHarness has three interlocking components: a SwarmRegistry built on a Distributed Hash Table (DHT) for peer discovery and capability advertisement; a SwarmRouter that dispatches tasks to nodes using a utility function over capability, load, latency, and trust; and SwarmCredit, an incentive mechanism that attributes compute-credit rewards to contributing nodes via a Shapley-value approximation. Nodes earn credits by serving tasks and spend credits to submit them; idle nodes that never contribute drain credits and lose routing priority, creating a self-regulating participation economy. As nodes specialise toward high-reward skills and routing signals act as digital pheromones, the network exhibits emergent collective intelligence analogous to biological swarms. Beyond compute sharing, SwarmHarness is a foundational primitive for autonomous distributed AI agent networks in which agents hire compute, route subtasks, and settle credits without human intermediation.

</details>


### [430] [CaMBRAIN: Real-time, Continuous EEG Inference with Causal State Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28792)
*Abhilash Durgam,Nyle Siddiqui,Jeffrey A. Chan-Santiago,Qiushi Fu,Elakkat D. Gireesh,Mubarak Shah*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CaMBRAIN，首个基于Mamba的因果状态空间模型，用于EEG信号的实时长程推断，配合多阶段自监督训练，在3个数据集上达到SOTA，吞吐量提升>10倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG深度学习模型存在两大问题：(1)基于注意力机制导致序列长度二次方复杂度；(2)固定长度输入需要滑窗处理，无法全局理解长程信号。需要一种能高效处理任意长度EEG信号的因果模型。

Method: 提出CaMBRAIN：基于Mamba的状态空间模型(SSM)，利用因果单向特性避免双向模型开销。同时设计多阶段自监督训练流水线，专门训练隐藏状态保留长程上下文信息，保持线性时间复杂度。

Result: 在3个不同EEG数据集上达到SOTA，吞吐量比现有模型高>10倍，首次实现了对可变长度EEG信号的长程连续推断。

Conclusion: CaMBRAIN证明了因果SSM在EEG长程信号处理中的有效性，解决了注意力机制的二次复杂度和滑窗限制，为实时EEG推断提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) is a critical, non-invasive method to monitor electrical brain activity. EEGs can span anywhere from a couple seconds to multiple hours, posing a major hurdle for existing deep learning methods due to two major factors: (1) existing EEG models are predominantly built upon the attention mechanism, incurring quadratic scaling as the sequence length increases, and (2) raw EEG signals must be processed in a sliding-window fashion due to fixed-length input requirements, preventing global understanding of the entire signal. To this extent, we propose CaMBRAIN - the first Causal, Mamba-based state space model (SSM) capable of real-time inference of EEG signals, arguing that bidirectional approaches are needlessly expensive given the causal, unidirectional nature of EEG. However, training such a model is non-trivial, as crucial EEG events can be extremely brief - within fractions of a second - yet separated by long intervals spanning minutes. Current EEG methods use self-supervised objectives that optimize for signal reconstruction, but these are not well suited for streaming SSMs; they fail to explicitly train the hidden state to retain the salient long-range context needed for streaming inference. We therefore introduce a multi-stage self-supervised training pipeline specifically tailored to encourage long-range memory retention and strong performance on EEG signals, while preserving the linear-time complexity of state space models. CaMBRAIN achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results across 3 different EEG datasets with >10x higher throughput than existing models, enabling the first model capable of long-range, continuous inference of variable-length EEG signals.

</details>


### [431] [Calibrating Conservatism for Scalable Oversight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28807)
*William Overman,Mohsen Bayati*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出校准集体监督（CCO）方法，通过聚合多样化的辅助评分函数来惩罚偏离保守基线的行为，并利用在线共形决策理论动态校准保守程度，从而在有限时间界限和无分布假设下确保不良后果低于用户指定阈值。实验表明，该方法能有效约束对抗性更强的恶意智能体，并在伦理违规减少和奖励保持之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主规划与交互的智能体系统可能超越人类能力，导致人类难以维持有效监督。现有可扩展监督方法依赖复杂假设、缺乏统计保证或难以适用于序列决策场景，亟需一种具有理论保障的实用方案。

Method: 提出校准集体监督（CCO），聚合多个辅助评分函数形成惩罚项，衡量偏离保守基线的程度；借鉴可达到效用保留思想实现集体保守主义；利用共形决策理论在线校准保守程度，提供有限时间界和无分布假设的统计保证。

Result: 在修改版SWE-bench上，较弱监督者成功约束了对抗性更强的恶意智能体；在MACHIAVELLI上，CCO显著减少伦理违规同时保持奖励。两类实验中经验违规率与指定目标高度吻合。

Conclusion: CCO提供了一种具有统计保证的可扩展监督方法，能够在不依赖强分布假设的情况下，通过集体保守机制有效约束超越人类能力的智能体，实验验证了理论预测的准确性。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems capable of autonomous planning and extended environmental interaction pose a fundamental control problem: how can humans maintain meaningful oversight of systems that may exceed their own capabilities? Existing approaches to scalable oversight rely on complex assumptions, remain largely heuristic, or lack practical methods for sequential settings with statistical guarantees. We introduce Calibrated Collective Oversight (CCO), which aggregates diverse auxiliary scoring functions into a penalty measuring deviation from a conservative baseline. Inspired by Attainable Utility Preservation, CCO enables collective conservatism: actions face a penalty proportional to overseer concern, so high-utility actions are still selected when overseers find them unobjectionable and overridden only when concern accumulates. CCO calibrates this conservatism online using Conformal Decision Theory, ensuring that undesirable outcomes remain below a user-specified target threshold with finite-time bounds and no distributional assumptions. On a modified version of SWE-bench, weaker overseers successfully constrain an adversarially misaligned stronger agent; on MACHIAVELLI, CCO substantially reduces ethical violations while preserving reward. In both settings, empirical violation rates closely match the specified targets, as predicted by the theory.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [432] [Memory-Based vs. Context-Only Conditioning Produces Distinct Behavioral Patterns in Stateful Personalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27389)
*Junsoo Park,Youssef Medhat,Htet Phyo Wai,Ploy Thajchayapong,Ashok K. Goel*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文研究了教师端教育推荐系统中条件化上下文对个性化行为的影响。通过对比基于当前学生问题的上下文条件化和基于持久学习者信息的记忆条件化，发现上下文推荐对问题响应更敏感，而记忆推荐表现出历史依赖行为（包括相同输入下的差异化推荐）。教师端评估表明两种推荐均可解释、可操作。结论：基于嵌入的相似度指标能捕捉当前问题的响应性，但无法刻画基于学习者历史的个性化，需行为级诊断研究条件化效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究教育推荐系统中条件化上下文（当前学生问题 vs. 持久学习者信息）如何塑造个性化推荐行为，并理解不同条件化方式对推荐行为的影响差异。

Method: 使用偏差相关分析和成对统计检验，对比基于当前问题的上下文条件化推荐与基于历史信息的记忆条件化推荐的行为差异。

Result: 上下文推荐对当前问题响应性更强（问题级响应），记忆推荐表现出历史依赖行为（包括相同输入下的学习者特异性差异化）。教师端评估信号表明两种推荐均可解释且可操作。

Conclusion: 基于嵌入的相似度指标适合捕捉对当前问题的响应性，但不足以刻画基于学习者历史的个性化；需要行为级别的诊断方法来系统研究条件化效果。

Abstract: We study how conditioning context shapes personalization behavior in a teacher-facing educational recommender system. We compare contextual conditioning based on the current student question with memory-based conditioning using persistent learner information. Using deviation correlation and paired statistical tests, we find that contextual recommendations exhibit stronger question-level responsiveness, while memory-based recommendations exhibit history-dependent behaviors, including learner-specific differentiation under identical input. Teacher-facing evaluation signals suggest these recommendations are interpretable and actionable. These results indicate that embedding-based similarity metrics capture responsiveness to the current question but do not characterize personalization grounded in learner history, motivating behavior-level diagnostics for studying conditioning effects.

</details>


### [433] [Will AI be overconfident about academic research findings when reliant on abstracts? (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27392)
*Mike Thelwall*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 研究发现，论文摘要中的主张强度通常高于正文讨论部分，如果LLM仅基于摘要生成回答，可能导致对研究结果过度自信的误导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM越来越多地被用于学术知识检索和总结，但由于缺乏全文访问权限，模型可能仅依赖摘要回答问题，而摘要本身可能存在信息偏差或过度断言，这可能导致用户被误导。

Method: 将学术论文的全文提交给GPT-OSS 120B，分别评估摘要、讨论和结论部分中主要结果的主张强度，并比较不同学科领域的差异。

Result: 在社会科学和人文学科之外的领域，摘要和结论中的主张强度通常高于讨论部分，表明仅依赖摘要会导致对研究结果过于自信的判断。

Conclusion: 如果LLM仅摄取摘要而非全文，存在向用户传递过度自信研究结论的风险，这进一步提醒我们在学术知识发现和总结中使用LLM时需保持谨慎。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) like ChatGPT, DeepSeek and Gemini seem to be increasingly used for knowledge discovery, information retrieval, and knowledge summaries, including for academic topics. This can result in users being misled, such as due to hallucinations. These problems may be exacerbated for academic knowledge if LLMs base their answers on journal article abstracts when they lack full text access. To test whether the information content of abstracts can be misleading, full text articles were submitted to the GPT-OSS 120B, an LLM from OpenAI, asking it to assess separately the strength the claims for the main result in the abstract, discussion, and conclusion. Outside the social sciences and humanities, claims tended to be stronger in the abstract and conclusions than the discussion, suggesting that relying on the strength of claims in abstracts would be misleading. Thus, if LLMs ingest abstracts but not full texts, there is a risk that they will be overconfident about the findings and pass it on to users in response to relevant prompts. This is another reason to be cautious about using LLMs for academic-related knowledge discovery and summaries.

</details>


### [434] [Ocean4Rec: Offline LLM-Derived OCEAN Profiles for Request-Time VOD Reranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27429)
*Wonkyun Kim,Sehyun Bae,Kwanki Ahn,Mungyu Bae,Saeun Choi,Soyeon You,Chandra Prabhakar,Sehyun Kim*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Ocean4Rec 是一种用于工业 VOD 推荐的离线 LLM 重排序层，通过预计算物品的 OCEAN 人格特征和用户画像，在请求时进行纯数值重排序，无需在线调用 LLM，在三星智能电视日志上 NDCG@20 提升 7.6%-61.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业视频点播推荐系统需要更丰富的内容理解，但 LLM-as-reranker 的设计在每次请求时都需要重复进行提示构建、token 生成、模型调用、输出解析和降级处理，在高吞吐、低延迟的服务中导致吞吐规划困难、尾延迟不可控、容量隔离差以及运维不可预测。

Method: 离线阶段：用 LLM 从物品元数据中提取 OCEAN（开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性、神经质）五维人格评分；用户画像则通过对最近点击和深度链接物品的 OCEAN 评分做时间衰减聚合构建。请求阶段：将预计算的物品画像、用户画像、基础推荐分数和目录新鲜度进行数值拼接，执行纯数值重排序，完全避免在线 LLM 调用。

Result: 在三星智能电视匿名 VOD 日志上，对 Top1000 候选集进行时间留出离线评估：NDCG@20 相比更强的 Base+Recency 基线，NCF 生成器提升 7.6%，LightGCN 生成器提升 61.5%；HR@20 对 NCF 无显著结论，对 LightGCN 提升 67.3%。

Conclusion: Ocean4Rec 提供了一种有界辅助内容-品味特征，既保留了无需请求时调用 LLM 的可部署性优势，又通过离线预计算的方式将 LLM 的语义理解能力融入工业推荐系统，实现了在线性能与内容理解深度的平衡。

Abstract: Industrial video-on-demand (VOD) recommenders need richer content understanding, but LLM-as-reranker designs repeat prompt construction, token generation, model invocation, output parsing, and fallback handling for each request. In high-volume latency-sensitive services, these request-time operations complicate throughput planning, tail-latency control, capacity isolation, and predictable operation. This paper presents Ocean4Rec, a reranking layer that uses an LLM only offline to materialize item OCEAN profiles from content metadata. Items are mapped into Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism scores, while user profiles are built by time-decayed aggregation of recently clicked and deep-linked items in the same five-dimensional space. At request time, Ocean4Rec joins precomputed item profiles, user profiles, base recommender scores, and catalog recency, then performs numeric reranking without an LLM call. On anonymized Samsung Smart TV VOD logs, same-candidate Top1000 temporal-holdout offline evaluations show that Ocean4Rec improves NDCG@20 over a stronger non-OCEAN Base+Recency ordering by 7.6% for an NCF generator and 61.5% for a LightGCN generator. HR@20 is inconclusive for NCF and improves by 67.3% for LightGCN, reflecting sparse exact-item replay labels and the strength of recency as an industrial baseline. The result should be read as offline replay evidence for a bounded auxiliary content-taste feature that preserves the deployability advantage of a request-time-LLM-free serving path.

</details>


### [435] [FD-RAG: Federated Dual-System Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27432)
*Tianhao Gao,Kai Yang,Yiyang Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: FD-RAG提出了一种联邦双系统检索增强生成框架，通过解耦轻量级内存访问和按需LLM推理，在边缘设备上实现去中心化的知识检索，在提升准确率的同时大幅降低延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统假设集中式知识访问和充足计算资源，但在边缘环境中，知识分散在各设备、原始数据无法共享、频繁调用LLM成本过高，因此需要一个去中心化且高效的RAG方案。

Method: FD-RAG通过在本地语料上学习语义感知的自适应超图，将其蒸馏为紧凑的QA记忆；推理时，对覆盖面好的查询直接通过内存匹配回答，仅在必要时调用LLM，并将检索到的记忆追溯至超图证据；通过聚合匿名化记忆实现跨设备知识融合而不暴露原始文档。

Result: 在问答基准测试上，FD-RAG相比强基线方法准确率提升最高7.8%，延迟降低8.4倍；理论分析证明超图学习具有O(1/ε²)的收敛速率。

Conclusion: FD-RAG为边缘环境下的去中心化RAG提供了一种兼顾效率与隐私的可行方案，通过双系统设计平衡了轻量记忆检索和LLM推理的成本。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has emerged as a paradigm for grounding large language models in external knowledge, yet most existing RAG systems assume centralized knowledge access and ample computation. These assumptions break down in edge environments, where knowledge is fragmented across devices, raw data cannot be shared, and repeated LLM calls are prohibitively expensive. We propose FD-RAG, a federated dual-system RAG framework that decouples lightweight memory access from on-demand LLM reasoning for decentralized deployment. Specifically, FD-RAG learns semantic-aware adaptive hypergraphs over local corpora and distills them into compact QA memories. At inference time, it answers well-covered queries via direct memory matching and invokes LLM-based reasoning only when necessary, while tracing retrieved memories to hypergraph-grounded evidence. To mitigate cross-device knowledge fragmentation, FD-RAG aggregates anonymized memories across devices without exposing raw documents. Experiments on QA benchmarks show that FD-RAG improves accuracy by up to 7.8\% while reducing latency by 8.4$\times$ compared with strong local and federated baselines. We also provide theoretical analysis establishing an $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^{2})$ convergence rate for the proposed hypergraph learning, supporting its tractable deployment in edge settings.

</details>


### [436] [RE-TRIANGLE: Does TRIANGLE Enable Multimodal Alignment Beyond Cosine Similarity in Retrieval?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27436)
*Arijit Ghosh,Aritra Bandyopadhyay,Chiranjeev Bindra,Jingfen Qiao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文复现了TRIANGLE框架，验证了几何对齐在多模态检索中的有效性，但发现其优化不稳定且收益具有领域依赖性，无法完全复现原始论文中从头训练的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统成对对齐策略存在几何盲点：在锚点模态（如文本）与其他模态对齐时，缺乏对周边模态间（如视频与音频）一致性的约束。TRIANGLE通过最小化超球面上模态三元组的面积来实现整体对齐，本文旨在验证该几何目标的稳健性。

Method: 1) 复现TRIANGLE的几何对齐目标（最小化模态三元组面积）；2) 在零样本和从头训练两种设置下与成对基线对比；3) 使用合成玩具数据集分析优化不稳定的原因；4) 检验余弦正则化及领域微调的影响。

Result: 1) 零样本设置下TRIANGLE优于成对基线，Recall@1最高提升+8.7点，但收益具有领域依赖性；2) 未能复现从头训练的结果；3) 几何对齐与DTM损失的联合优化存在不稳定性；4) 余弦正则化主要稳定文本到视频检索；5) 领域监督放大几何收益但降低跨数据集泛化能力。

Conclusion: 几何对齐策略在多模态检索中有效，但存在显著的优化敏感性，收益受领域和训练设置影响较大，实际应用需谨慎考虑稳定性问题。

Abstract: Multimodal alignment is critical for bridging the semantic gap in information retrieval. However, traditional pairwise strategies introduce a geometric blind spot: while they align anchor modalities (e.g., text) with others, they lack constraints to enforce mutual consistency between peripheral modalities (e.g., video and audio). The TRIANGLE framework addresses this by minimizing the area of modality triplets on a hypersphere to enforce holistic alignment. In this reproducibility study, we verify the robustness of this geometric objective for retrieval tasks. We confirm that TRIANGLE outperforms pairwise baselines in zero-shot settings, achieving Recall@1 gains of up to +8.7 points, though benefits are domain-dependent. However, we fail to reproduce the reported learning-from-scratch results. Analysis using a synthetic toy dataset attributes this to instability when jointly optimizing geometric alignment with Data-Text Matching (DTM) loss. Furthermore, we find that cosine regularization primarily stabilizes text-to-video retrieval, and fine-tuning with domain supervision amplifies geometric benefits but reduces cross-dataset generalization. Our findings support the efficacy of geometric alignment while highlighting critical optimization sensitivities. Code available at https://github.com/ARIJIT00171/RE-TRIANGLE.

</details>


### [437] [MGRetrieval: Memory-Guided Reflective Retrieval for Long-Term Dialogue Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27437)
*Tan Wang,Yunwei Dong*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出MGRetrieval，一种基于历史记忆语义结构引导反射式检索的策略，用于解决LLM长期对话中外记忆系统检索不充分、路径不稳定和延迟高的问题，在LoCoMo数据集上平均F1提升8.91%、BLEU-1提升11.11%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM长期对话代理中，外部记忆系统主要依赖一次性检索，难以获取充分且相关的证据；近期方法虽引入反射机制，但检索路径由LLM基于有限证据生成，导致检索不稳定且额外延迟高。

Method: MGRetrieval分为两步：(1) 参考历史记忆的语义结构构建更精确的检索路径；(2) LLM保留关键记忆并判断累积记忆是否足以停止迭代检索，通过记忆引导检索和关键记忆传播逐步构建简洁充分的记忆上下文。

Result: 在LoCoMo数据集上，基于Qwen2.5-14B和Qwen3-14B，MGRetrieval相比最强基线平均F1提升8.91%，BLEU-1提升11.11%，且保持实用的token和延迟成本。

Conclusion: MGRetrieval通过语义结构引导的反射式检索有效解决了记忆检索不充分和不稳定的问题，在性能提升的同时控制了计算开销。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant progress in dialogue, yet redundant memory contexts severely limit their effectiveness in long-term dialogue agents. External memory systems have been proposed to improve memory maintenance. However, these systems mainly rely on one-shot retrieval, which limits their ability to retrieve sufficient and relevant evidence. Although recent methods introduce reflection into retrieval, their retrieval paths are generated by the LLM from limited evidence, leading to unstable retrieval and additional latency overhead. %These limitations highlight the need for effective retrieval mechanisms. To address these limitations, we propose MGRetrieval, a retrieval strategy that grounds reflective retrieval in the semantic structure of historical memories. Specifically, MGRetrieval consists of two steps: (1) It references the structure of historical memories to construct a more precise retrieval path. (2) The LLM retains critical memories and determines whether accumulated memories are sufficient to stop further iterative retrieval. This allows the retrieval process to follow semantically meaningful paths. Through memory-guided retrieval and critical memory propagation, MGRetrieval gradually constructs concise and sufficient memory contexts. Extensive experiments on LoCoMo show that MGRetrieval outperforms the strongest baseline by 8.91\% in F1 and 11.11\% in BLEU-1 on average across Qwen2.5-14B and Qwen3-14B, while maintaining practical token and latency costs. The code can be found in https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MGRetrieval.

</details>


### [438] [Prominence-Stratified Failure Modes in Retrieval-Augmented Commercial Recommendation: A 37,000-Run Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27439)
*Will Jack,Noah Lehman,Keller Maloney,Sarah Xu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文通过37,000次生产运行实验，研究了AI助手（如ChatGPT和Claude）作为推荐引擎而非搜索引擎时，对不同知名度层级品牌的推荐行为差异。发现L1头部品牌虽高频出现但转化率低（25-41%），L2挑战者转化率最高（37-52%），L3中端品牌处于拐点，L4专业品牌和L5区域品牌面临灾难性不可见性（48-52%从未出现）。研究结论是：品牌在AI推荐中的营销策略应根据其在知名度阶梯上的位置差异化制定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统搜索引擎优化（SEO）研究已无法解释AI助手作为推荐引擎的推荐行为。AI助手直接推荐品牌而非返回链接列表，因此需要理解"面向AI的营销"这一新问题——品牌定位、内容和产品适配度与可发现性同等重要。

Method: 研究者对四种模型配置、215个涵盖19个行业的商业框架提示语进行了约37,000次生产运行实验，使用包含533个品牌、按五个知名度层级（L1行业领导者到L5区域玩家）分层的参考目录进行评估，目录依据外部权威列表构建。

Result: L1品牌出现在几乎所有相关检索中，但仅赢得25-41%的推荐位；L2挑战者转化率最高（37-52%），但在Anthropic模型上因人物角色中介替代而受损；L3中端品牌覆盖降至88%，转化率34-40%，人物角色效应达到峰值；L4和L5品牌中48-52%从未出现在任何一次运行中。

Conclusion: 不存在统一的优化方案，品牌在AI推荐中的营销投入策略应取决于其在知名度阶梯上的位置：L1需关注差异化而非可见性，L2需应对模型中介替代，L3需管理多重效应，L4/L5则面临基本的生存挑战。

Abstract: AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude are recommendation engines, not search engines: they answer commercial queries by directly nominating brands rather than returning a list of links. Marketing to AI is therefore a broader problem than "show up in search" -- positioning, content, and product fit matter as much as discoverability. We audit ~37,000 production runs across four model configurations and 215 commercially-framed prompts spanning 19 sectors, evaluated against a 533-brand reference catalog stratified into five prominence tiers (L1 category leaders to L5 regional players) sourced from external authority lists. The ladder proxies a brand's awareness footprint within its sector, not revenue or market share. The failure mode differs sharply by tier. L1 brands appear in nearly every relevant retrieval but win only 25-41% of the recommendation slots they reach -- the leverage is differentiation, not visibility. L2 challengers carry the highest conversion rates of any tier (37-52%) but lose to persona-mediated substitution on the Anthropic models. L3 mid-market brands are the inflection level: aggregate coverage drops to 88%, conversion to 34-40%, and persona effects peak. L4 specialists and L5 regional players face catastrophic invisibility -- 48-52% never surface in any of the 37,000 runs. No uniform optimization recipe wins; the right marketing investment depends on where the brand sits on the prominence ladder.

</details>


### [439] [Paraphrase Brittleness in Production Retrieval-Augmented Commercial Recommendation: Reproducibility Below the Rerun-Stability Baseline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27440)
*Will Jack,Noah Lehman,Keller Maloney,Sarah Xu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 同一购买意图的不同措辞（如"best CRM" vs "top CRM"）会导致AI助手的推荐结果差异极大（Jaccard相似度仅0.135-0.288），远低于相同提示词重复运行的基线（0.50-0.61）。提示词字符串而非购买意图主导了推荐结果，且增加推理努力无法缩小差距。这挑战了当前流行的AEO/GEO实践，指出逐提示词的品牌提及追踪作为度量单位存在结构性不稳定问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示AI助手推荐对提示词措辞的高度敏感性，质疑当前AEO/GEO（答案引擎优化/生成引擎优化）实践中基于固定提示词集追踪品牌"AI可见性"的有效性。

Method: 在OpenAI和Anthropic模型上进行约6,000次释义运行和约6,000次相同提示词重运行对照，比较不同措辞变体（包括措辞微调、约束条件添加、地域/语言变化、特异性层级变化）下推荐集的Jaccard相似度。

Result: 措辞微调变体的Jaccard相似度为0.288（95% CI [0.215, 0.361]），添加约束的变体仅为0.135（[0.098, 0.175]），远低于相同提示词重运行的基线0.50-0.61。增加推理努力对差距影响有限（变化幅度不超过±0.05）。

Conclusion: 逐提示词追踪品牌提及作为度量单位存在结构性不稳定问题，因为结果的主要方差来源是追踪器选择了哪种措辞，而非模型对品牌的行为。有意义地改进需要改变度量单位本身，而非简单扩大提示词集。

Abstract: Small changes to how a buyer phrases a question -- "best CRM" vs "top CRM" vs "best CRM for a SaaS startup" -- produce substantially different brand recommendations from AI assistants. Across ~6,000 paraphrase runs and ~6,000 same-prompt rerun controls on OpenAI and Anthropic models, the recommendation-set similarity (Jaccard) between two paraphrases of the same underlying buying intent is 0.288 for cosmetic rewordings (clustered 95% CI [0.215, 0.361]) and 0.135 for constraint-adding rewordings ([0.098, 0.175], pooling region/language and specificity-ladder axes) -- both far below the 0.50-0.61 same-prompt rerun baseline. The prompt string, not the underlying buyer intent, is the dominant input to which brands surface. Increasing reasoning effort does not narrow the gap (bounded by +/-0.05). This is a direct challenge to an increasingly popular AEO/GEO practice. Tracking a brand's "AI visibility" by counting brand mentions over a fixed set of prompts produces a metric whose dominant source of variance is which paraphrase the tracker happens to issue, not the model's behavior toward the brand: the same buyer intent in two natural paraphrases produces recommendation sets that overlap 14-29% in Jaccard versus 50-61% for same-prompt reruns. Sampling more paraphrases per intent reduces the artifact in principle, and efficient multi-prompt evaluation methods exist in the academic literature, but the natural buyer-phrasing space is much larger than the benchmark-scale prompt sets those methods have been validated on, and far beyond what any commercial tracker issues per brand-intent combination. Prompt-by-prompt mention tracking is therefore structurally unstable as a unit of measurement; meaningful improvement likely requires a different unit rather than a larger prompt set.

</details>


### [440] [A Unified Structured Query Understanding Framework for Industrial Semantic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27441)
*Ping Liu,Qianqi Shen,Jianqiang Shen,Chunnan Yao,Kevin Kao,Rajat Arora,Dan Xu,Baofen Zheng,Yunxiang Ren,Benjamin Le,Ali Hooshmand,Igor Lapchuk,Juan Bottaro,Raghavan Muthuregunathan,Caleb Johnson,Liangjie Hong,Jingwei Wu,Wenjing Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于小语言模型（SLM）的统一直观查询理解系统，替代传统碎片化的级联架构，并通过Query Illuminator框架（教师模型+替代裁判）解决数据瓶颈问题，在LinkedIn求职搜索和人物搜索场景中验证了有效性，提升了用户参与度并降低了运营成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统大工业搜索系统的查询理解由多个独立、任务特定的组件级联实现，这种碎片化架构维护成本高，且在长尾查询上表现不一致，亟需一种统一的解决方案。

Method: 提出统一的、基于小语言模型（SLM）的查询理解系统，采用模式约束生成（schema-constrained generation）整合异构功能；同时提出Query Illuminator框架，作为教师模型进行自动标注与知识蒸馏，并作为替代裁判实现可扩展的低资源场景评估。

Result: 在LinkedIn求职搜索的离线与在线测试中取得正面效果，并通过人物搜索的跨领域案例验证了框架的水平可扩展性。用户参与度提升，运营成本降低，同时满足了低延迟和有限GPU资源的严格服务约束。

Conclusion: 基于SLM的统一结构化查询理解系统能够有效替代传统级联架构，Query Illuminator框架解决了统一建模的数据瓶颈，且该方案具有良好的跨领域泛化能力和实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Query understanding in large-scale industrial search systems is typically implemented as a cascade of disparate, task-specific components. While individually optimizable, this fragmented architecture incurs high maintenance overhead and results in inconsistent behaviors, particularly for long-tail queries. In this work, we propose and deploy a unified structured query understanding system that consolidates these heterogeneous functions into a single Small Language Model (SLM) that performs schema-constrained generation. To address the data bottlenecks inherent in unified modeling, we introduce Query Illuminator, a dual-purpose framework serving as: (i) a teacher model for high-quality auto-annotation and distillation, and (ii) a surrogate judge for scalable evaluation where human labels are scarce. We validate this approach through extensive offline and online tests within LinkedIn's Job Search system. Furthermore, we demonstrate the framework's horizontal extensibility through a cross-domain case study on People Search. The results show improved user engagement and reduced operational costs, achieved while satisfying strict low-latency serving constraints on limited GPU resources.

</details>


### [441] [A Systematic Evaluation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Language Models for Space Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27444)
*Ruben Belo,Marta Guimarães,Cláudia Soares*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了检索增强生成（RAG）流水线在航天领域文档信息提取与综合中的表现，证明其能有效提升知识获取效率、降低不确定性并支持复杂航天操作中的决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 航天活动的快速发展导致技术文档、操作指南和科学文献大量积累，给航天操作的及时决策带来挑战，需要能够高效处理海量异构信息源的工具。

Method: 系统评估了检索增强生成（RAG）流水线的性能，将大语言模型与信息检索技术结合，比较了不同的检索策略、嵌入模型和LLM回答，评估其对信息准确性、相关性和可靠性的影响。

Result: RAG流水线能够显著增强知识获取、降低不确定性，并支持复杂航天操作中的决策。

Conclusion: RAG流水线是提升航天领域信息处理与决策支持能力的有效方法。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of space activities has led to an unprecedented accumulation of technical documentation, operational guidelines, and scientific literature, creating challenges for timely decision-making in space operations. Effective management in space operations requires tools capable of efficiently processing vast and heterogeneous information sources. This paper systematically evaluates the performance of Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, combining Large Language Models (LLMs) with information retrieval techniques for extracting and synthesizing actionable knowledge from domain-specific documents. We compare various retrieval strategies, embedding models, and LLM answers to assess their impact on information accuracy, relevance, and reliability. Our results demonstrate that RAG pipelines can significantly enhance knowledge access, reduce uncertainty, and support decision-making in complex space operations.

</details>


### [442] [RAGe: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Evaluation Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27445)
*Larissa Guder,João Pedro de Moura,Arthur Accorsi,Gustavo Losch do Amaral,Maurício Cecílio Magnaguagno,Felipe Meneguzzi,Marcio Sorraglia Pinho,Dalvan Griebler*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一个名为RAGe的模块化框架，用于通过资源遥测和组件推荐来基准测试和指导RAG应用的高效开发，帮助研究人员在特定领域数据集上选择最佳组件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 部署LLM/RAG应用面临高计算需求、知识库过时以及需要手动选择最优组件等挑战。

Method: 提出RAGe框架，整合文档分块、向量数据库、嵌入模型和检索器等核心技术，评估精度、效率和可扩展性之间的权衡，并将检索/生成质量与硬件约束相关联。

Result: 能够识别最有效的领域特定RAG配置，支持在消费级硬件上快速原型开发。

Conclusion: RAGe通过资源感知的组件推荐，降低了RAG应用开发和部署的门槛，促进快速原型设计。

Abstract: Deploying Large Language Model (LLM) applications, particularly those relying on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), remains challenging due to high computational demands, outdated knowledge bases, and the need to manually select optimal pipeline components. In this work, we propose a modular framework for benchmarking and guiding the efficient development of RAG applications by focusing on resource telemetry and component recommendation, suggesting the best components for a domain-specific dataset. Our approach leverages core techniques in LLM applications, including document chunking, vector databases, embedding models, and retrievers, to evaluate trade-offs among accuracy, efficiency, and scalability. By directly correlating retrieval and generation quality with underlying hardware constraints, RAGe supports researchers to identify the most effective, domain-specific RAG setups for their specific operational needs, facilitating rapid prototyping even on consumer-grade hardware.

</details>


### [443] [Checking Fact with Better Retrieval: Dynamic Contrastive Learning for Evidence Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27449)
*Zhongtian Hua,Yi Luo,Meijia Yu,Yingjie Han*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一种动态自适应对比学习证据检索方法(DACLR)，利用多模态大模型统一转换为文本，通过两阶段检索(召回-重排)和三层对比损失优化，动态调整难负样本比例，提升多模态事实验证中证据检索的事件级相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有通用多模态检索方法基于语义构建，检索到的证据与声称虽语义相似但事件层面不相关，影响下游事实验证准确性。

Method: 1) 使用MLLM将多模态证据和声称统一转换为文本模态，提取事件级特征；2) 采用召回-重排两阶段检索；3) 基于InfoNCE设计三个损失函数(语义级和事件级)，设置三组难负样本候选；4) 根据批内样本准确率监督信号动态调整损失比例。

Result: 广泛的对比实验和消融实验证明了DACLR及其内部优化方法的有效性，进一步研究也展示了其在多模态证据检索领域的优势。

Conclusion: DACLR通过事件级感知和动态对比学习，在不遗忘语义检索能力的前提下，有效提升了多模态证据检索的事件相关性。

Abstract: In the field of multimodal fact checking, the accuracy of retrieving evidence from different modalities has a significant impact on the downstream claim verification process. Existing general multimodal retrieval methods are often constructed based on semantics, resulting in the retrieved evidence being similar but not relevant to the claim. This paper proposes a \textbf{D}ynamic \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{L}earning method for evidence \textbf{R}etrieval called DACLR to address these issues. DACLR first uses a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to uniformly convert multimodal evidence and claims into text modalities, and extracts the features of these information at event level. Then, it conducts evidence retrieval through a two-stage retrieval method of recall-rerank. DACLR enhances the model's event perception ability of the retrieval stage by optimizing the contrastive loss and mining hard negative samples. Specifically, DACLR designs three loss functions at two levels (semantic and event) based on the InfoNCE loss.Corresponding to these, three sets of hard negative sample candidates are set up. The model dynamically adjusts the ratio based on the accuracy supervision signal of intra-batch samples, allowing the model to learn the correlation between claims and positive samples at the event level without forgetting the semantic retrieval ability. Extensive comparison and ablation experiments demonstrates the effectiveness of DACLR and its internal optimization methods. Further research also prove the advantages of DACLR in the field of multimodal evidence retrieval.

</details>
