### [444] [Context Features Are Cheap: Rank-Aware Decomposition for Efficient Feature Interaction in Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27450)
*Yevgeny Tkach*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种秩感知分解方法，将推荐系统中原本对每个候选样本重复计算的上下文特征操作，改为一次请求只计算一次，在保持模型等价的前提下，显著提升吞吐量（87.5%），并进一步提出rDCN架构变体，在深度方向上也保持秩分离，减少67%的FLOPs。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代工业推荐系统的深度排序模型需要为N个候选样本重复计算相同的上下文特征，存在大量冗余计算，效率低下。

Method: 基于线性/双线性运算对秩分解输入可精确块分解的代数原理，将FM、DCNv2、自注意力、全连接层中的上下文计算从"每个候选计算一次"改为"每个请求计算一次"；并进一步提出rDCN架构，保持深度方向上的秩分离。

Result: 无需架构改动，生产级DLRM排序器吞吐量提升87.5%（峰值pod数减少47%）；rDCN在训练噪声范围内匹配DCNv2精度，同时减少67%的总FLOPs。

Conclusion: 秩感知分解是一种高效且与模型等价的优化手段，可广泛应用于现代推荐系统中的多种交互机制，显著降低计算开销。

Abstract: Modern industrial recommender systems use a deep ranking model to score N candidates against the same user and context features. Standard implementations broadcast context features early in the forward pass, redundantly computing context-only operations N times per request. We present a rank-aware decomposition applicable to the dominant interaction mechanisms in modern recommender architectures-Factorization Machine (FM) pairwise products, Deep Cross Network (DCNv2) cross layers, self-attention, and fully connected (FC) projection layers-built on a single algebraic principle: any linear or bilinear operation over a rank-partitioned input admits an exact block decomposition that moves context-only computation from once-per-candidate to once-per-request, identity-equivalent to the original model. Closed-form analysis and controlled ablation verify that savings scale quadratically with the number of context features. Applied to a production DLRM-style ranker without any architectural change, the decomposition increases per-pod throughput by 87.5% (a 47% reduction in peak pod count) at identical model predictions.
  The identity-equivalent decomposition applies only at the first layer of cross networks and self-attention, since each layer mixes ranks in its output. To extend savings across depth, we further introduce rDCN, an architectural variant of DCNv2 that maintains rank discipline across depth and matches DCNv2 accuracy within training noise at 67% fewer total FLOPs, and sketch an analogous architectural variant for self-attention.

</details>


### [445] [Eliot: Interactively $\underline{E}$xploring Fast-Changing Scientific $\underline{Li}$terature Trends with $\underline{O}$nline Da$\underline{t}$a and Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27610)
*Bernardo A. Denkvitts,Nitin Gupta,Biplav Srivastava*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文介绍Eliot系统，一个交互式工具，用于实时检索arXiv论文、聚类主题并可视化其时间分布，帮助研究者追踪快速发展的科学文献演化趋势。通过离线配置研究和用户调研验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学出版物快速增长，现有搜索引擎和LLM工具虽能检索或摘要论文，但隐藏了语料选择、组织方式及时间演化模式，缺乏可追溯性。

Method: 系统接收查询词和过滤器后实时检索arXiv论文，用标题和摘要表示每篇论文，通过聚类（MiniLM嵌入+10维UMAP+凝聚聚类）将语料组织成主题，分配代表性关键词，并可视化各主题的出版年份分布。

Result: 离线实验对比了多种文档表示、降维和聚类方法，确定了MiniLM+10维UMAP+凝聚聚类为默认配置。场景调查和专家焦点小组中，85%的响应认为聚类标签有意义，系统被评价为对快速变化技术领域的可审计概览最有价值。

Conclusion: 查询时聚类和时间检查方法可以补充现有的搜索和生成工具，帮助研究人员检查和提炼文献趋势背后的证据。

Abstract: The rapid growth of scientific publishing has made it increasingly difficult to track how fast-moving areas evolve. Search engines and LLM-based assistants retrieve or summarize papers, but often hide how the corpus was selected, organized, or connected to temporal patterns. We present $\texttt{Eliot}$, a publicly deployed interactive system for traceable exploration of evolving scientific literature. Motivated by two studies on Large Language Models (LLMs) and Automated Planning and Scheduling (APS), $\texttt{Eliot}$ generalizes literature-evolution analysis beyond hand-built taxonomies and domain-specific scripts. Given explicit query terms and filters, it retrieves arXiv papers at query time, represents each paper by title and abstract, clusters the corpus into themes, assigns representative keywords, and visualizes each cluster's publication-year distribution. We evaluate $\texttt{Eliot}$ as both an applied system and an interactive research aid. An offline configuration study across eight arXiv domains compares document representations, dimensionality reduction methods, and clustering algorithms using intrinsic clustering and topic-coherence metrics; the results support MiniLM embeddings with 10-dimensional UMAP and Agglomerative Clustering as a practical default. A scenario-based survey and expert focus group assess interpretability and use contexts: participants rated cluster labels as meaningful in 85% of scenario responses, and feedback indicated that $\texttt{Eliot}$ is most valuable for auditable overviews of rapidly changing technical areas. These results suggest that query-time clustering and temporal inspection can complement search and generation tools by helping researchers inspect and refine the evidence behind literature trends.

</details>


### [446] [Developing an Intelligent Job Recommendation System Using Semantic Retrieval and Explainable AI Techniques](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27656)
*Hussein Al Awad,Khaled Fathi Omar*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于元数据的混合型职位推荐系统，结合TF-IDF词汇匹配、Sentence-BERT语义检索、查询感知过滤、可选的Cross-Encoder重排序以及解释生成模块。在31262条LinkedIn职位数据上，最佳混合配置达到了Precision@10为0.8032，nDCG@10为0.9496，证明了仅用结构化元数据即可实现可解释且有效的职位推荐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线招聘平台需要从海量异构职位中检索相关机会，基于关键词的搜索虽然高效可解释，但当相同岗位使用不同术语表达时容易失效。现有方法多依赖完整职位描述或用户历史行为，而结构化元数据（如职位名称、公司、地点等）的潜力未被充分挖掘。

Method: 系统采用多阶段混合架构：1) TF-IDF进行词汇级匹配；2) Sentence-BERT进行语义检索；3) 查询感知过滤筛选结果；4) 可选Cross-Encoder重排序提升精度；5) 生成推荐解释。仅使用结构化元数据（职位名称、公司、地点、级别、职能、雇佣类型、行业），不依赖职位全文或用户交互历史。

Result: 在31262条清洁后的LinkedIn职位数据集上，最佳混合配置Precision@10=0.8032，nDCG@10=0.9496。内部评估中，Cross-Encoder重排序将Precision@10从0.7896提升至0.7948，nDCG@10从0.9666提升至0.9739。

Conclusion: 词汇检索与语义检索技术可以有效结合，在仅提供结构化元数据的场景下实现可解释的职位推荐。混合方法在精度和排序质量上均优于单一方法，Cross-Encoder重排序能带来进一步的边际提升。

Abstract: Online recruitment platforms require recommendation methods capable of retrieving relevant job opportunities from large and heterogeneous collections of job postings. Keyword-based search is efficient and interpretable, but it may fail to retrieve relevant postings when equivalent roles are expressed using different terminology. This study presents a metadata-driven job recommendation system that combines TF-IDF lexical matching, Sentence-BERT semantic retrieval, query-aware filtering, optional Cross-Encoder re-ranking, and explanation generation. The proposed system utilizes structured metadata fields including job title, company name, location, seniority level, job function, employment type, and industry without relying on full job descriptions or user interaction histories. Experiments conducted on a cleaned LinkedIn job posting dataset containing 31262 records demonstrate that the best hybrid configuration achieved a Precision at 10 score of 0.8032 and an nDCG at 10 score of 0.9496. Under the internal evaluation protocol, Cross-Encoder re-ranking improved Precision at 10 from 0.7896 to 0.7948 and nDCG at 10 from 0.9666 to 0.9739. These findings indicate that lexical and semantic retrieval techniques can be effectively combined to provide explainable job recommendations when only structured metadata is available.

</details>


### [447] [Joint Optimization of Relevance and Engagement in Multi-Task Ranking for E-Commerce with Efficient LLM Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27704)
*Luming Chen,Jiaqi Xi,Raghav Saboo,Kenny Chi,Martin Wang,Sudeep Das,Danny Nightingale,Aditya Dodda,Elyse Winer,Akshad Viswanathan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个工业级多任务排序系统，通过引入语义相关性作为优化目标，使用轻量级LLM生成三级相关性标签，实现了相关性-用户参与度的可控平衡，在离线NDCG@10和在线A/B实验中均显著提升了语义对齐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业搜索排序模型仅优化用户参与信号会引入系统性偏差（偏向热门或价格锚定商品），无法满足用户的语义搜索意图，需要将语义相关性作为显式优化目标。

Method: 1) 多任务排序架构：包含一个序数相关性预测头（预测累积概率分布）+ 参与度预测头，通过统一的价值模型评分函数实现平衡；2) 使用微调后的轻量级LLM生成三级序数相关性标签（不相关/中等相关/高度相关）；3) 解决标签分布敏感性问题，确保与人工标注高度对齐，覆盖超过1亿查询-商品对。

Result: 离线NDCG@10和在线A/B实验表明，该方法显著提升了语义对齐效果，同时保留了核心参与度目标。

Conclusion: 通过多任务学习框架将语义相关性纳入工业级搜索排序，配合LLM生成的高质量序数标签，能够有效缓解参与信号带来的偏差，实现可控的相关性-参与度权衡。

Abstract: Optimizing industrial search ranking models solely for user engagement signals often introduces systematic biases, prioritizing popular or price-anchored items that may not satisfy semantic intent. We present a production-scale multi-task ranking system that integrates semantic relevance as a primary optimization objective, enabling explicit and controllable relevance-engagement trade-offs. Our architecture employs an ordinal relevance head that predicts cumulative probabilities over relevance thresholds, preserving the inherent ordering of labels. These outputs are integrated with engagement heads through a unified value model scoring function, enabling systematic balancing of semantic quality and short-term behavioral signals. To provide high-quality supervision for this multi-task framework, we utilize fine-tuned lightweight Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate three-level ordinal relevance labels: irrelevant, moderately relevant, and highly relevant. We address challenges regarding label distribution sensitivity and ensure high alignment with human annotations to enable efficient labeling for over 100 million query-item pairs. Evaluation across offline metrics, including NDCG@10, and online A/B experiments demonstrates that our approach significantly improves semantic alignment while preserving core engagement objectives.

</details>


### [448] [LRanker: LLM Ranker for Massive Candidates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27810)
*Tao Feng,Zijie Lei,Zhigang Hua,Yan Xie,Shuang Yang,Ge Liu,Jiaxuan You*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: LRanker是一种面向大规模候选集排序的框架，通过K-means聚类编码候选信息和基于图的测试时缩放机制，在百万级候选池中显著提升了排序性能，跨七个任务实现30%以上的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM排序方法受限于有限的上下文长度和高计算成本，难以应用于候选池规模达百万级的真实场景。

Method: 提出LRanker框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 候选聚合编码器，利用K-means聚类建模全局候选信息；(2) 基于图的测试时缩放机制，将候选划分为子集，生成多个查询嵌入并通过集成方式融合，提升鲁棒性和表达能力。

Result: 在RBench的三种场景中：小规模场景提升30%+，大规模场景MRR提升3-9%，超大规模场景(680万+候选)提升20-30%。

Conclusion: LRanker在大规模候选排序任务中展现出鲁棒性、可扩展性和有效性，能显著提升LLM在真实场景中的排序能力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown strong potential for ranking by capturing semantic relevance and adapting across diverse domains, yet existing methods remain constrained by limited context length and high computational costs, restricting their applicability to real-world scenarios where candidate pools often scale to millions. To address this challenge, we propose LRanker, a framework tailored for large-candidate ranking. LRanker incorporates a candidate aggregation encoder that leverages K-means clustering to explicitly model global candidate information, and a graph-based test-time scaling mechanism that partitions candidates into subsets, generates multiple query embeddings, and integrates them through an ensemble procedure. By aggregating diverse embeddings instead of relying on a single representation, this mechanism enhances robustness and expressiveness, leading to more accurate ranking over massive candidate pools. We evaluate LRanker on seven tasks across three scenarios in RBench with different candidate scales. Experimental results show that LRanker achieves over 30% gains in the RBench-Small scenario, improves by 3-9% in MRR in the RBench-Large scenario, and sustains scalability with 20-30% improvements in the RBench-Ultra scenario with more than 6.8M candidates. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of its key components. Together, these findings demonstrate the robustness, scalability, and effectiveness of LRanker for massive-candidate ranking.

</details>


### [449] [Fine-Tuned LLM as a Complementary Predictor Improving Ads System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27856)
*Hui Yang,Daiwei He,Kevin Jiang,Taejin Park,Kungang Li,Jiajun Luo,Yuying Chen,Xinyi Zhang,Sihan Wang,Haoyu He,Yu Liu,Lakshmi Manoharan,David Xue,Shubham Barhate,Runze Su,Duna Zhan,Ling Leng,Siping Ji,Jinfeng Zhuang,Alice Wu,Leo Lu,Han Sun,Zhifang Liu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的广告推荐范式：将开源大语言模型微调为辅助预测器，通过预测潜在广告主来增强传统候选生成与排序流程，并在大规模工业广告系统中验证了其离线与在线收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在推荐系统中的应用主要集中在生成式检索、重排序和辅助信号增强三类范式，但在广告场景下的生产级大规模工业系统中应用仍然稀少，亟需探索新的有效路径。

Method: 将开源LLM微调为广告特定的辅助预测器，利用用户画像和历史行为预测可能的广告主，其输出作为先验信息增强传统候选生成过程，并向下游排序阶段传递有用特征。

Result: 在大规模生产广告系统中，该方法取得了显著的离线指标提升和可衡量的在线业务效果改善，证明LLM的世界知识和预测能力可以被高效利用。

Conclusion: 针对性的辅助预测可以同时改进召回和排序阶段，实现端到端的推荐效果提升，为LLM增强推荐系统提供了一条实用且可扩展的工业落地路径。

Abstract: Recommendation systems power engagement and monetization across feeds, ads, and short-video platforms, but translating the latest advances in Large Language Models into Recommendation Systems (RecSys) gains remains rare, particularly in advertising and production-scale real-world industry setups. Prior real-world LLM successes typically fall into three buckets: (a) generative retrieval that directly predicts the next items for candidate generation, (b) late-stage re-ranking that uses LLMs, and (c) auxiliary signal enrichment with LLMs. We introduce a complementary paradigm for ads: a fine-tuned open-source LLM used not as a ranker, but as an ads-specific ancillary predictor, forecasting likely advertisers from user profiles and histories. This LLM-driven advertiser prediction augments conventional candidate generation and provides informative priors to downstream ranking. Developed in a large-scale production advertising system, our approach produces substantial offline improvements and measurable online business impact, demonstrating that LLM world knowledge and predictive capacity can be efficiently harnessed. Beyond validating LLMs for ads applications, our results show that targeted ancillary predictions can unlock end-to-end gains across both retrieval and late-stage ranking, offering a practical path to LLM-enhanced recommendation at scale.

</details>


### [450] [Beyond Similarity: Task-Aligned Retrieval for Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27951)
*Zhixing Sun,Shenghe Xu,Tao Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出TAG框架，用基于适用性的规则检索替代传统RAG的语义相似度检索，在规则驱动型任务中显著提升性能并大幅减少检索内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAG依赖语义相似度检索，但在规则驱动型任务中，语义相似的段落不一定是任务最需要的上下文，成功完成任务需要的是正确的规则、约束或程序性指导，而非主题相关性。

Method: TAG框架：1) 将源文档转化为可追踪的条件-动作规则；2) 通过成对LLM判断识别哪些规则适用于给定输入；3) 仅基于选中的动作生成输出。

Result: 在Wikipedia NPOV改写、HumanEval PEP 8合规、NBA交易推理三个任务上，TAG均优于标准RAG，在高不匹配场景下提升最多12.2%，同时检索内容减少93%。

Conclusion: 在规则和指令驱动的任务中，检索应优化适用性而非仅优化语义相似度。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) ranks passages by semantic similarity to the input, implicitly assuming that semantic similarity is a reliable indication of applicability in downstream tasks. This assumption breaks down when task success depends not on topical relevance but on applying the correct rules, constraints, or procedural guidance. In such settings, the most useful context may be the rule triggered by the input rather than the most semantically similar passage. We propose Task-Aligned Retrieval (TAG), a retrieval framework that replaces similarity-based retrieval with applicability-based rule selection. TAG transforms source documents into traceable condition-action rules, identifies which rules apply to a given input through pairwise LLM judgments, and generates the output conditioned only on the selected actions. We empirically observe that across Wikipedia NPOV rewriting, HumanEval with PEP~8 compliance, and NBA transaction reasoning on RuleArena, TAG consistently outperforms standard RAG, with the largest gains in high-mismatch settings (up to 12.2\%) while reducing retrieved context by up to 93\%. These results suggest that, in rule- and instruction-governed tasks, retrieval should optimize for applicability rather than for semantic similarity alone.

</details>


### [451] [Mixture-of-Experts Knowledge Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Multi-Agent LLM-based Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28175)
*Shijie Wang,Chengyi Liu,Yujuan Ding,Shanru Lin,See-Kiong Ng,Xu Xin,Wenqi Fan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出MixRAGRec，一种基于多智能体协作的KG-RAG推荐框架，通过混合专家检索、知识偏好对齐和对比学习增强推荐，解决现有方法检索粒度单一、知识转换有损、端到端学习困难等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推荐系统依赖参数化知识，存在知识过时问题；KG-RAG虽能引入结构化知识，但面临查询复杂度不同导致检索粒度不匹配、图结构转文本存在信息损失、检索粒度缺乏直接监督难以端到端学习等挑战。

Method: 提出MixRAGRec多智能体框架，包含：1) Mixture-of-Experts检索智能体，根据查询复杂度选择不同粒度的KG检索专家；2) 知识偏好对齐智能体，将结构化知识转化为LLM友好的自然语言；3) 对比学习增强推荐智能体，使用对比偏好反馈训练。通过MMAPO统一优化三个智能体。

Result: 在真实数据集上的大量实验证明了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过多智能体协作与统一优化策略，MixRAGRec有效解决了KG-RAG推荐中检索粒度不匹配、知识转换损失和端到端学习困难等关键问题，提升了推荐性能。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted for recommendations due to their ability to understand user intent and item semantics. However, LLM-based recommender systems often rely on parametric knowledge and suffer from outdated knowledge, motivating knowledge graph retrieval-augmented generation (KG-RAG) to ground recommendations on structured, up-to-date KGs. Despite this promise, effective KG-RAG in recommendations faces great challenges. First, users' queries vary in complexity and require KG knowledge at different granularities, whereas existing methods adopt a one-size-fits-all retrieval strategy, leading to over-retrieval for simple queries and under-retrieval for complex ones. In addition, augmenting LLMs with KG knowledge requires translating graph-structured data into linear text, which may introduce noise and cause structural information loss. Moreover, the selection of retrieval granularity lacks direct supervision and must be inferred from the final recommendation after alignment and downstream utilization, making query-aware retrieval hard to learn end-to-end. To address these issues, we propose MixRAGRec, a cooperative multi-agent framework for KG-RAG recommendations. MixRAGRec integrates a Mixture-of-Experts Retrieval Agent that routes each query to a KG retrieval expert with different granularities, a Knowledge Preference Alignment Agent that converts structured knowledge into LLM-friendly natural language, and a Contrastive Learning-reinforced Recommendation Agent trained with contrastive preference feedback. Notably, we introduce Mixture-of-Experts Multi-Agent Policy Optimization (MMAPO) to train three agents under a unified objective. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.

</details>


### [452] [Whose Name Comes Up? III: Persona Prompting Effects in LLM-Based Scholar Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28187)
*Annabella Sánchez-Guzmán,Lukas Eberhard,Denis Helic,Lisette Espín-Noboa*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个基准，通过控制模型选择和提示设计两个变量，系统审计43个LLM在6个学科领域的学者推荐表现，发现技术质量主要受模型驱动，事实性和平等性受上下文影响，多样性受位置影响，提示设计是不可忽视的因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有审计存在英语中心、单一学科、忽略角色特征的局限，对LLM学者推荐输出差异的来源理解不足。

Method: 构建基准并审计43个LLM，通过变化提示词（语言、地点、角色任务）和上下文（领域、资历、k值），将推荐学者与Semantic Scholar进行对比，衡量技术质量（事实性、覆盖率）和社会代表性（多样性、平等性）。

Result: 基础技术质量由模型选择驱动，事实性和平等性由上下文驱动，多样性由地点驱动。南非提示产生低事实性列表，日本提示产生高事实性但同质化的列表。

Conclusion: 提示设计是LLM学者发现中不可忽视的变量，应与模型选择一起被系统审计。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as scholar recommenders, shaping who is seen as an expert in academia. Existing audits remain English-centric, single discipline, and persona-agnostic, leaving the source of output variability poorly understood. To this end, we propose a benchmark that disentangles the effects of model choice and prompt design on recommendations. We audit 43 LLMs by varying persona prompts (language, location, role-and-task) and context (field, seniority, k). Recommended scholars are compared against Semantic Scholar over six scientific disciplines to measure technical quality (factuality, coverage) and social representativeness (diversity, parity). Basic technical quality is driven by model choice, factuality and parity by context, and diversity by location. South Africa prompts yield less factual lists, while Japan prompts yield highly factual but homogeneous lists skewed toward highly productive scholars. Prompt design is thus a non-trivial axis of LLM-based scholar discovery and should be systematically audited alongside model choice.

</details>


### [453] [Looking Farther with Confidence: Uncertainty-Guided Future Learning for Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28493)
*Ziqiang Cui,Xing Tang,Peiyang Liu,Xiaokun Zhang,Shiwei Li,Xiuqiang He,Chen Ma*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出UFRec框架，通过不确定性引导的未来监督和未来感知对比学习，自适应地利用多步未来交互信息增强序列推荐，在四个数据集上超越SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督序列推荐方法大多只关注下一项预测，忽视了长程未来交互中的丰富信息；少数利用未来数据的方法对所有样本施加相同强度的未来监督信号，导致次优解。

Method: 提出UFRec框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 不确定性引导的未来监督模块，根据模型在当前主任务上的置信度动态调整多步未来监督的权重；2) 未来感知对比学习模块，将未来轨迹作为整体进行对比学习。两个模块仅在训练时使用，不增加推理开销。

Result: 在四个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法通过有效利用未来数据显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 自适应地根据模型置信度调整未来监督强度，并结合全局未来轨迹对比学习，能有效缓解数据稀疏性并提升序列推荐性能。

Abstract: Sequential recommendation effectively models dynamic user interests but continues to face challenges related to data sparsity. While self-supervised learning has alleviated this issue to some extent, most existing methods focus exclusively on immediate next-item prediction during training, thereby neglecting the rich information embedded in longer-term future interactions. Although a few studies have explored the utilization of future data, existing attempts typically apply future supervision signals with uniform intensity across all samples, which may lead to suboptimal solutions. In this paper, we propose an adaptive future learning framework, UFRec, which encourages the model to look further ahead when it is confident in the current state, while focusing on the immediate task when it is uncertain. Specifically, UFRec incorporates an Uncertainty-Guided Future Supervision module that dynamically modulates the weight of multi-step future supervision based on the model's confidence in the primary next-item prediction task. Furthermore, we complement step-wise future supervision with a Future-Aware Contrastive Learning module that treats the future trajectory as a holistic entity. Notably, both auxiliary modules are utilized exclusively during training and incur no inference overhead. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by effectively leveraging future data.

</details>


### [454] [Search for Coverage: Learning Coverage-Aware Retrieval with Augmented Sub-Question Answerability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28522)
*Jia-Huei Ju,Eugene Yang,Trevor Adriaanse,Suzan Verberne,Andrew Yates*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: CoveR是一种针对长文本RAG场景优化的密集检索方法，通过覆盖度对比学习和蒸馏目标训练双编码器，结合SCOPE数据集（90K训练对），实现覆盖度提升10%的同时保持相关性检索能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长文本RAG面临覆盖度排序挑战，传统排序方法难以确保检索结果包含全面的相关事实片段（nuggets），从而影响最终生成内容的完整性和全面性。

Method: 提出CoveR双编码器模型，采用基于覆盖度的对比学习和蒸馏目标进行训练；构建SCOPE数据集（90K训练对），利用LLM生成子问题可回答性判断作为覆盖度信号增强。

Result: 相比强密集检索基线，nugget覆盖度提升10%，且不牺牲相关性检索能力；消融实验验证了学习方法在覆盖度与相关性排序之间取得更优权衡。

Conclusion: CoveR有效解决了长文本RAG中的覆盖度排序问题，实现了相关性与覆盖度的最佳平衡，对长文本生成任务至关重要。

Abstract: Long-form Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) brings the challenge of coverage-based ranking, because ranking methods must ensure the inclusion of comprehensive relevant nuggets (i.e., facts), which can thereby be synthesized into a comprehensive output. In this work, we propose CoveR (Our code is available at https://github.com/DylanJoo/CoveR ) a dense retrieval method optimized for coverage-aware retrieval scenarios. CoveR is a bi-encoder trained with the coverage-based contrastive and distillation objectives, which enables CoveR to capture diverse aspects of information needs. To train CoveR, we create the SCOPE dataset, (Our training data is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/DylanJHJ/scope ) which comprises 90K training pairs from Researchy Questions with synthetic coverage signals augmented from sub-question answerability judgments generated by LLMs. Our empirical experiments show that CoveR enhances nugget coverage by 10\% over strong dense retrieval baselines without sacrificing its relevance-based retrieval capability. Further ablation studies validate the importance of our proposed learning method, showing that CoveR achieves a superior trade-off between relevance- and coverage-based ranking, which is essential for long-form RAG.

</details>


### [455] [Subtraction Gets You More: Gap-Aware Retrieval for Multimodal Multi-Hop QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28641)
*Sunah O,Jay-Yoon Lee*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAIL框架，通过隐式查询重写解决多模态多跳问答中检索阶段的"语义锚定"问题，采用上下文减法查询引导和动态路由机制，在MultimodalQA上实现40.3%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统迭代检索框架存在"语义锚定"（Semantic Anchoring）问题——先前获取的证据会困住检索器，产生实体中心化的冗余信息，限制了搜索视野。

Method: 提出GRAIL框架，包含：(1) 隐式查询重写——在嵌入层面直接操作，而非文本层面；(2) 上下文减法查询引导（context-subtractive query steering）用于跨模态组合推理；(3) 加法嵌入更新用于局部信息聚合；(4) 基于任务类型的动态路由混合框架。

Result: 在MultimodalQA上实现40.3%的宏平均性能提升，在证据集补全和序列池构建两个任务上均展现出更优的噪声鲁棒性和搜索范围扩展能力。

Conclusion: GRAIL通过隐式查询重写有效打破语义锚定陷阱，迭代的"gap-aware"优化显著扩展了搜索视野，为多模态多跳问答的检索阶段提供了更优范式。

Abstract: In multimodal multi-hop question answering, we focus on the initial retrieval stage via two distinct tasks: (1) evidence set completion, retrieving missing evidence given context, and (2) sequential pool construction, iteratively building the top-$K$ pool from the scratch. Under these settings, we point out that conventional iterative retrieval frameworks often suffer from Semantic Anchoring, where previously fetched evidence traps the retriever and yields entity-centric redundancy. To break this trap, we propose GRAIL (Gap-aware Retrieval via Adaptive Implicit Localization), a paradigm that performs implicit query rewriting directly at the embedding level. By context-subtractive query steering, GRAIL excels at compositional cross-modal reasoning, while additive embedding updates show strength on localized information aggregation. By dynamically routing queries based on task type, our Hybrid Framework achieves a 40.3\% macro-averaged performance gain on MultimodalQA. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that sequential GRAIL retrieves in a superior, noise-resilient manner, significantly expanding the search horizon through iterative gap-aware optimization.

</details>


### [456] [Do Agents Need Semantic Metadata? A Comparative Study in Agentic Data Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28787)
*Shiyu Chen,Tarfah Alrashed,Alon Halevy,Natasha Noy*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文通过对比实验发现，使用语义元数据（schema.org）的智能体在检索可操作数据方面比直接搜索网页的智能体精确度高出44.9%-65.7%，尽管后者覆盖面更广。结论是结构化语义元数据仍然是可靠自主工作流不可或缺的基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型能够在非结构化网页中导航，作者质疑语义元数据（如schema.org）对于智能体数据发现是否仍然必要，或者智能体能否直接从网页中可靠检索可操作数据。

Method: 对比分析两种智能体：基线智能体（搜索数十亿开放网页文档）与语义智能体（利用9000万使用schema.org的数据集）。采用"LLM-as-a-judge"评估流程，直接映射到FAIR原则，评估检索数据的语义相关性、数据可访问性和计算实用性。

Result: 语义智能体在精确度上显著领先：元数据丰富注册表精确度高出44.9%，机器可读下载页面精确度高出46.6%，整体FAIR合规数据集检索精确度高出65.7%。基线智能体虽能回答多40%的问题，但存在"最后一公里效用"失败，检索结果中20.1%为散文式页面，8.5%为门户登录页而非实际数据。

Conclusion: 非结构化检索支持广泛的探索性任务，但结构化语义生态系统仍然是执行导向的可靠自主工作流不可或缺的基础。

Abstract: In the era of autonomous agents, machine-actionable data is critical for data-driven workflows. For more than a decade, semantic metadata like schema.org has anchored the FAIR principles (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, and Reusable) for machine-actionable data and enabled discovery tools like Google Dataset Search. However, the rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) capable of navigating the unstructured web raises a fundamental question: Is semantic metadata still necessary for agentic data discovery, or can agents reliably retrieve actionable data directly from the web? We present a comparative analysis of agentic data retrieval across two distinct environments: a Baseline Agent searching billions of open-web documents, and a Semantic Agent leveraging a corpus of 90 million datasets using schema.org. We deploy an "LLM-as-a-judge" evaluation pipeline, mapped directly to the FAIR principles, to assess the semantic relevance, data accessibility, and computational utility of the retrieved data. Our results reveal a clear divergence. The Semantic Agent excels at retrieving actionable data, achieving a 44.9% higher precision for metadata-rich registries and a 46.6% higher precision for pages with machine-readable downloads among its returned results. Conversely, the Baseline Agent frequently suffers "Last-Mile Utility" failures, retrieving prose-heavy pages (20.1% of results) and portal landing pages (8.5%) rather than actual data pages. While the Baseline Agent achieves higher coverage by answering 40% more questions, the Semantic Agent delivers greater accuracy, achieving 65.7% higher overall precision in retrieving FAIR-compliant datasets. We conclude that while unstructured retrieval supports broad exploratory tasks, structured ecosystems remain the indispensable foundation for reliable, execution-oriented autonomous workflows.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [457] [Personalized Observation Normalization for Federated Reinforcement Learning in Simulation Environments with Heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27385)
*Yiran Pang,Zhen Ni,Xiangnan Zhong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对联邦强化学习在异构环境中状态转移动态差异导致的问题，论文提出个性化观测归一化（PON）方法，让每个智能体使用持续更新的运行均值和方差进行本地状态归一化，实验表明该方法在异构MuJoCo任务上加速训练并取得更优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦强化学习在异构环境中面临不同智能体状态转移动态不一致的问题，导致输入分布差异和聚合时参数更新不均衡，影响全局策略训练效果。

Method: 提出个性化观测归一化（PON）方法，每个智能体使用持续更新的运行均值和方差对原始状态输入进行本地归一化，确保局部特征在聚合时保持一致性缩放，且不共享归一化参数以适应当地输入分布。

Result: 在异构MuJoCo任务上，PON方法相比基线方法加速了训练过程并取得了更优的性能表现。

Conclusion: 个性化归一化参数对于异构联邦强化学习是必要的，共享归一化参数效果不佳，PON方法有效解决了异构环境下的分布偏移和聚合不均衡问题。

Abstract: Federated reinforcement learning (FedRL) enables multiple agents to collaboratively train a global policy without sharing raw data, making it ideal for privacy-sensitive applications. However, FedRL faces challenges in heterogeneous environments where differing state-transition dynamics lead to non-identical input distributions and imbalanced parameter updates during aggregation. Therefore, this paper develops a personalized observation normalization (PON) method, allowing each agent to locally normalize raw state inputs using a continuously updated running mean and variance. This design ensures consistent scaling of local feature without overshadowing across agents during aggregation. Furthermore, we demonstrate that sharing normalization parameters across agents is ineffective due to the diverse local input distributions, which highlights the necessity of personalized statistics. Experiments on heterogeneous MuJoCo tasks show that our developed PON accelerates training and achieves superior performance compared to baseline methods.

</details>


### [458] [Benchmarking Inductive Biases for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection with a Robust Multi-View Channel-Graph Detector](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28103)
*Junhao Wei,Yanxiao Li,Bidong Chen,Yifu Zhao,Haochen Li,Dexing Yao,Baili Lu,Xudong Ye,Jietian Feng,Sio-Kei Im,Yapeng Wang,Xu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对多变量时间序列异常检测进行了统一的实验、分析和基准研究，评估了10个代表性检测器在5个数据集上的表现，并提出了一种自适应检测器家族\ours{}，该模型在宏观平均VUS-ROC上达到最优（0.675，比第二名LSTM-AE高5.1个百分点），并在鲁棒性方面表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MTS异常检测研究缺乏统一的实验协议和公平比较，不同方法在窗口化、评分、硬件和指标上差异大，导致难以判断各方法真实优劣。

Method: ①统一协议：所有方法共享相同的窗口化、评分、硬件和度量协议。②评估维度：从有效性、效率、鲁棒性和跨数据集泛化四个角度评估。③提出\ours{}：结合NOTEARS约束的有向通道图视图，可选补丁注意力与时间关联视图的自适应检测器家族。

Result: \ours{}在宏观平均VUS-ROC上达到0.675，比第二名LSTM-AE高5.1个百分点；在所有五个数据集上均进入前三；在噪声、通道丢弃和时间偏移扰动下鲁棒性最强。

Conclusion: 没有单一偏好的基线方法占主导地位；绝对扰动VUS-ROC比保留比率更具信息量；MSDS是事件密集型部署工作负载而非稀疏点异常基准；\ours{}在整体性能和鲁棒性上均显著优于其他方法。

Abstract: We present a unified experiment, analysis, and benchmark study of multivariate time-series (MTS) anomaly detection. Ten family-representative detectors -- spanning statistical, reconstruction, association, frequency, and generic-transformer families -- are evaluated on five datasets (SMD, MSL, SMAP, PSM, and MSDS) under effectiveness, efficiency, robustness, and cross-dataset generalisation. All methods share the same windowing, scoring, hardware, and metric protocols. Effectiveness, ablation, and robustness use three random seeds; cross-dataset transfer uses seed~0 because each extra seed requires $250$ source-target evaluations. The benchmark yields three method-independent findings: no single-bias baseline dominates; absolute perturbation VUS-ROC is more informative than retention ratios; and MSDS behaves as an event-dense deployment workload rather than a sparse point-anomaly benchmark. Under this protocol we also introduce \ours{}, an adaptive detector family combining a NOTEARS-constrained directed channel-graph view with optional patch-attention and temporal-association views. \ours{} achieves the best macro-average VUS-ROC ($0.675$, $+5.1$~pt over the second-best LSTM-AE), ranks first overall, and reaches the top-3 on all five datasets. Its wins on MSL and MSDS are narrow, while its average and robustness gains are larger: under the same three-seed robustness protocol for every method, it obtains the strongest absolute VUS-ROC across noise, channel dropout, and time-shift perturbations. We release the MSDS preprocessing protocol, configurations, scripts, and seed-level metric dumps.

</details>


### [459] [IGADA-IoT: IoT Sensor Energy Optimization in Wireless Sensor Networks Driven by Automatic Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27397)
*Mingchun Sun,Rongqiang Zhao,Muhammad Abdul Munnaf,Jie Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种信息缺口引导的物联网传感器自动数据增强框架（IGADA-IoT），通过分层多生成器协作与调度，以及信息缺口-模型性能联合评估闭环方法，有效提升WSN数据增强精度，平均提升下游模型准确率7.27%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有WSN数据增强方法依赖单一生成器和经验性数量设定，无法建立动态信息缺口与多个生成器之间的映射，忽视生成样本异质性，且缺少同时考虑信息缺口与模型性能的评估与闭环方法。

Method: 提出IGADA-IoT框架，包含分层多生成器协作与调度策略（HMGCS）以提升样本分配的针对性与合理性，以及信息缺口-模型性能联合评估与闭环方法（IGMP-EC）以增强增强决策准确性并避免欠增强与过增强风险。

Result: IGADA-IoT相比基线提升平均准确率7.27%，相比先进数据增强方法提升8.67%，相比单一生成器提升7.24%，在UCR Archive和真实部署数据集上验证了准确性和泛化性。

Conclusion: 所提出的分层多生成器协作与闭环评估机制能有效利用不同生成器能力减少信息缺口，提升物联网传感器数据增强的决策质量与模型性能。

Abstract: In wireless sensor networks (WSNs), data augmentation is a novel method to improve sampling-frequency decision performance, thereby enabling energy optimization for IoT (Internet of Things) sensors. However, existing methods rely on a single generator and empirically determined quantities, failing to establish a mapping between dynamic information gaps and multiple generators, and overlooking the heterogeneity of generated samples. Moreover, an evaluation and a closed-loop method that jointly considers the information gap and the model performance are lacking. To address these issues, we propose an information gap-guided IoT sensor automatic data augmentation framework (IGADA-IoT) with hierarchical multi-generator collaboration and scheduling over multiple rounds. Capabilities of different generators are jointly utilized to reduce the information gaps. In the IGADA-IoT, a hierarchical multi-generator collaboration and scheduling strategy (HMGCS) is proposed to enhance the targetedness and rationality of generated sample allocation. An information gap-model performance joint evaluation and closed-loop method (IGMP-EC) is proposed to enhance the accuracy of augmentation decisions, and to mitigate the risks of under-augmentation and over-augmentation. Experimental results show that the IGADA-IoT improves the average accuracy of multiple downstream models by 7.27%. Compared with advanced data augmentation methods, the average accuracy is improved by 8.67%. Compared with the individual generators, the average accuracy is improved by 7.24%. Furthermore, public IoT sensor datasets from the UCR Archive and real-world deployments demonstrate the accuracy and generalizability of the proposed method.

</details>


### [460] [Adaptive Bandit Algorithms for Contextual Matching Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28290)
*Shiyun Lin,Simon Mauras,Vianney Perchet,Nadav Merlis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究匹配市场中的上下文bandit学习问题，针对随机和对抗性两种上下文环境，提出了自适应算法并建立了相应的遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统匹配市场bandit研究忽略了上下文信息，而真实场景中玩家效用常依赖于可观测的上下文特征。然而上下文的细微变化可能彻底改变稳定匹配基准，导致其他玩家产生巨大遗憾，亟需解决这一复杂性问题。

Method: 引入最小偏好间隔(minimum preference gap)刻画学习难度；针对随机上下文设计全自适应算法，实现实例依赖的多对数遗憾上界；针对对抗性上下文提出新的遗憾概念，并设计自适应算法实现次线性遗憾界。

Result: 随机上下文下：得到实例依赖的多对数遗憾上界，以及在温和分布假设下的匹配实例无关遗憾上下界。对抗上下文下：提出可行的遗憾概念并实现次线性遗憾上界。

Conclusion: 本文首次系统性地处理了匹配市场中上下文信息带来的复杂动态基准问题，为随机和对抗两种设定提供了理论保证，填补了该方向的研究空白。

Abstract: We study bandit learning in matching markets, where players and arms constitute the two market sides, and the players' utilities are linear in the arm contexts. In each round, new arms arrive with observable contexts. Then, the algorithm matches them to players, aiming to minimize each player's regret against a stable matching benchmark. This contextual structure creates significant complexity: subtle context shifts can slightly alter one player's utility while completely reconfiguring the underlying benchmark, causing large regret spikes for others. We address this in two settings: stochastic contexts, drawn from a latent distribution, and adversarial contexts, which may be arbitrary. For the stochastic case, we introduce a novel minimum preference gap to capture learning difficulty and provide a fully adaptive algorithm with an instance-dependent poly-logarithmic regret upper bound. We also establish matching instance-independent regret upper and lower bounds under a mild distributional assumption. For the adversarial setting, we propose a tractable regret notion that remains valid under arbitrary contexts and achieves an instance-independent sublinear regret bound via an adaptive algorithm.

</details>


### [461] [A Simple State Space Model Excels at Multivariate Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27406)
*Hassan Saadatmand,Geoffrey I. Webb,Hamid Rezatofighi,Mahsa Salehi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了结构化状态空间模型（SSMs）在时间序列分类（TSC）中的应用，发现简单的S4D模型在准确率和效率上 consistently 优于复杂的Mamba架构，并提出了轻量级改进MS4和MS4N，在59个数据集上验证了其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Mamba-based SSMs在TSC领域虽有效但过于复杂，而更广泛的SSM设计空间（如S4D）尚未被充分探索。作者质疑是否真的需要如此高的复杂度才能获得顶尖性能。

Method: 系统对比了S4D和Mamba系列模型在TSC中的表现；提出了MS4（加入线性输入投影和通道混合机制）和MS4N（归一化变体，稳定状态动态）。

Result: S4D在准确率和效率上均优于Mamba变体；MS4/MS4N在59个数据集上超越Mamba模型，且MS4N以远小于竞品（2x-10x参数）的规模达到或超越其性能。

Conclusion: 轻量级结构化SSM是TSC中一个极具竞争力的方案，无需通过增加复杂度即可取得优秀表现。

Abstract: Structured state space models (SSMs) have recently emerged as a promising foundation for sequence modeling, with Mamba-based architectures demonstrating strong performance through input-dependent state transitions, albeit at considerable complexity. However, their application to time-series classification (TSC) has been largely limited to Mamba-style architectures, leaving the broader SSM design space underexplored. We present the first systematic study spanning diagonal SSMs (S4D) and input-dependent SSMs (Mamba family) on large-scale TSC benchmarks, asking whether such complexity is necessary for top performance. Our results reveal a surprising finding: S4D consistently outperforms Mamba-based variants in both accuracy and efficiency, challenging the assumption that increased complexity translates to meaningful gains in TSC. Building on this, we introduce MS4, lightweight modifications to S4D via a linear input projection and channel-mixing mechanism, and MS4N, a normalized variant that stabilizes state dynamics with negligible overhead. Evaluated on 59 datasets across MONSTER (up to 60 million samples, 50K timesteps, 82 classes) and the UEA benchmark, against 15 baselines, MS4 and MS4N consistently outperform Mamba-based models while remaining more efficient, and MS4N matches or surpasses competing deep learning models that are roughly 2x and 10x larger in parameters. These results position lightweight structured SSMs as a compelling alternative to scaling complexity for TSC.

</details>


### [462] [$E^3$-Agent: An Executable and Evolving Agent for Resource Management of Edge Generative Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27428)
*Rui Bao,Yaping Sun,Zhiyong Chen,Feng Yang,Meixia Tao,Nan Li,Wenjun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出E³-Agent，一个用于边缘AIGC资源管理的可执行且可进化的智能体。它通过分离快速路径路由器和慢路径LLM元控制器，能够在毫秒级做出调度决策，同时通过事件驱动的方式适应未知和时变的服务时间映射。实验表明，在动态场景下，相比最佳静态基线，平均延迟降低65%-73%，性能接近在线全信息Oracle。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘部署的生成式推理面临两个实际挑战：设备-模型性能在部署时往往未知，且由于用户驱动的语义事件、后台负载和设备变更而呈现非平稳性。离线调优的资源管理器在这种固定机制下变得脆弱且维护成本高。

Method: E³-Agent采用双路径架构：1) 快速路径路由器（fast-path router），负责毫秒级的调度决策；2) 慢路径LLM元控制器（slow-path, event-driven LLM meta-controller），通过工具接口暴露风险门控、路由器配置和快速性能校准等控制面，缓解机制偏移。智能体通过执行反馈在线学习，持续适应未知和时变的服务时间映射。

Result: 在离散事件模拟器（基于MLPerf设备-模型测量先验）上的实验涵盖冷启动预热和三种动态场景（语义动态、设备变更、隐藏漂移）。动态场景下，E³-Agent相比最佳静态基线平均延迟降低65%-73%，与在线全信息Oracle的差距仅为7%-10%，并能有效抑制语义退化下的卡顿率。

Conclusion: E³-Agent通过在线学习和双路径架构，成功解决了边缘AIGC资源管理中的非平稳性和未知性问题，在动态环境下实现了接近Oracle的性能，证明了该方法的有效性和实用性。

Abstract: Edge deployments of generative inference increasingly face two practical realities: per-device per-model performance is often unknown at deployment time, and it is non-stationary due to user-driven semantic events, background load, and device churn. Consequently, a resource manager that is tuned offline under a fixed regime can become brittle and expensive to maintain. This paper presents $E^3$-Agent, an executable and evolving agent for edge artificial intelligence generated content (AIGC) resource management. $E^3$-Agent separates a fast-path router that makes millisecond-level dispatch decisions from a slow-path, event-driven large language model (LLM) meta-controller that mitigates regime shifts through a small, explicit control surface exposed via a tool interface, including risk gating, router configuration, and rapid performance calibration. The agent learns online from execution feedback and continuously adapts to unknown and time-varying service-time mappings. We evaluate $E^3$-Agent in a discrete-event simulator driven by MLPerf-derived device-model measurement priors, covering cold-start warmup and three dynamic regimes: semantic dynamics, device churn, and hidden drift. Across the dynamic scenarios, $E^3$-Agent reduces average latency by 65%-73% compared to the best static baseline, stays within 7%-10% of an online full-information Oracle used for evaluation, and effectively suppresses stutter rate under semantic degradation.

</details>


### [463] [Tackling Multimodal Learning Challenges with Mixture-of-Expert: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27431)
*Liangwei Nathan Zheng,Wei Emma Zhang,Olaf Maennel,Lin Yue,Weitong Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该综述系统探讨了混合专家模型(MoE)如何有效解决多模态学习中的挑战，从高效多模态引擎、多模态表征学习器和多模态适配器三个视角进行了全面分析，并指出了当前研究的关键空白与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究要么单独评估多模态学习，要么独立评估MoE，忽视了二者之间独特的交互关系。本文旨在填补这一空白，回答"MoE如何有效解决多模态挑战？"这一核心问题。

Method: 从三个关键视角进行系统性文献综述：(1) MoE作为高效多模态引擎——通过解耦计算成本与参数增长，选择性激活专家来缓解模态冗余；(2) MoE作为多模态表征学习器——整合互补的多意见专家知识以丰富对齐与交互表征；(3) MoE作为多模态适配器——提供模块化灵活机制应对模态不平衡和模态缺失等不完美数据场景。

Result: 识别出关键研究空白，包括可解释路由、专家通信、模态整合以及终身多模态学习等方面。

Conclusion: 本文将自身定位为未来构建可解释、可持续的多模态混合专家系统的基础性工作。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) presents a naturally compatible and scalable framework for multimodal learning, demonstrating strong adaptability across diverse modalities and tasks. Despite its growing success, a comprehensive and systematic review on the MoE metho addressing multimodal challenges remains lacking. Existing surveys tend to evaluate either multimodal learning or MoE independently from method taxonomy, overlooking the unique interplay between them. This survey fills that gap by answering a central question: \textit{How does MoE effectively resolve multimodal challenges?} We approach this from three key perspectives: (1) \textbf{MoE as an Efficient Multimodal Engine:} enabling scalable multimodal modeling by decoupling computational cost from parameter growth and mitigating modality redundancy through selective expert activation; (2) \textbf{MoE as a Multimodal Representation Learner:} integrating complementary multi-opinion expert knowledge to enrich alignment and interaction representations; and (3) \textbf{MoE as a Multimodal Adapter:} providing a modular and flexible mechanism to model imperfect data scenarios such as modality imbalance and missing modality. Through our extensive literature review, we identify critical research gaps, including interpretable routing, expert communication, modality integration, and lifelong multimodal learning. We position this survey as a foundation for future research toward interpretable and sustainable multimodal Mixture-of-Experts system.

</details>


### [464] [Learning to Assess the Reliability of Number-of-Runs Estimation in Stochastic Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28309)
*Sara Gjorgjieva,Eva Tuba,Tome Eftimov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究如何通过机器学习方法自适应判断随机优化算法基准测试中所需的最小运行次数，基于统计特征训练分类器预测估计结果的可靠性，并在固定配置场景下实现了高召回率的不靠谱检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模随机优化算法基准测试中，重复运行虽能提升可靠性，但计算成本高昂。关键问题已从"是否重复运行"转向"何时停止收集证据而不浪费计算资源"。作者希望提出一种自适应、数据驱动的运行次数决策方法，减少不必要的计算开销。

Method: 扩展了一种基于经验的自适应在线启发式方法，利用异常值处理和偏度对称性检查动态估计所需运行次数。从132,000次Nevergrad运行（COCO基准，24个问题，20维，10个实例，11个优化器）中提取23个统计、无能量以及形状与稳定性特征，训练分类器预测运行次数估计是否可靠，重点通过少数类召回率检测错误估计。

Result: 在固定配置（同一优化器内训练和测试）场景下，模型能有效检测不可靠的运行次数估计，实现了较高的少数类召回率。但由于固定配置内数据多样性有限，整体性能受到制约。

Conclusion: 运行次数估计的可靠性可以通过机器学习在固定配置场景下进行学习，能够以高召回率识别不可靠的估计，但在数据多样性和泛化能力方面仍有提升空间。

Abstract: In large-scale benchmarking of stochastic optimization algorithms, the key challenge is no longer whether repeated runs are needed for reliability, but how to determine when sufficient evidence has been collected without incurring unnecessary computational cost. We study a learning-based extension of a recent empirical online heuristic that adaptively estimates the required number of runs using outlier handling and skewness-based symmetry checks. Using annotated outcomes from 132{,}000 Nevergrad runs on COCO (24 problems in 20 dimensions, 10 instances each, 11 optimizers), we train classifiers on 23 statistical, energy-free, and shape and stability features to predict whether a run-number estimate is reliable, prioritizing detection of incorrect estimates via minority-class recall. We evaluate reliability prediction using a within-configuration learning setup, where models are trained and tested on data sharing the same optimizer. The results show that run-number reliability can be learned in a within-configuration scenario, enabling detection of unreliable estimates with high minority-class recall, although performance remains limited by the restricted data diversity within fixed configurations.

</details>


### [465] [Metric-Aware PCA as a Linear Instance of Geometric Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27456)
*Michael Leznik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出度量感知主成分分析（MAPCA）在几何深度学习框架下的重新解释，建立了两者间的精确对应字典，并证明了不变PCA（IPCA）的唯一性定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将MAPCA纳入几何深度学习框架，建立经典降维方法与现代几何深度学习理论之间的形式化联系，揭示其背后的对称性原理。

Method: 通过六个维度（域、对称群、等变性、不变性、架构原语、几何先验）构建MAPCA与几何深度学习的字典映射；利用群论证明IPCA的唯一性定理。

Result: MAPCA的度量矩阵对应几何先验，正交群对应对称群，MAPCA解在该群下等变且谱不变，其约束条件是Schur型权重约束的线性类比。

Conclusion: 建立了MAPCA与几何深度学习的理论桥梁，并为核PCA、图谱方法及深度MAPCA等扩展方向提供了基础。

Abstract: Geometric deep learning organises neural architectures around the symmetries of their data domain, with the choice of symmetry group serving as a geometric prior that determines what representations can be learned. Metric-Aware Principal Component Analysis (MAPCA) parameterises principal component analysis by a positive-definite metric matrix, with a canonical subfamily interpolating between standard PCA and output whitening and a diagonal-metric point recovering Invariant PCA (IPCA). This paper positions MAPCA within the geometric deep learning framework. The metric is read as the geometric prior; the orthogonal group preserving it is the symmetry group it induces; MAPCA solutions are equivariant under this group with the resulting spectrum invariant; and MAPCA's defining constraint is the linear analogue of the Schur-type weight constraints used in equivariant networks. Across six axes - domain, symmetry group, equivariance, invariance, architectural primitive, and geometric prior - we construct a precise dictionary between MAPCA and geometric deep learning. The technical anchor is a uniqueness theorem characterising IPCA as the unique linear data-derived metric in the MAPCA family that is equivariant under arbitrary diagonal rescaling and projects onto the fixed-point set of the action, equivalent under normalisation to the variance-maximisation criterion in its precise form. The paper closes with three bridges: kernel PCA as the nonlinear extension, spectral graph methods as MAPCA on graphs, and a deep MAPCA construction extending the positioning into deep equivariant networks

</details>


### [466] [CLANE: Continual Learning of Actions on Neuromorphic Hardware from Event Cameras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28387)
*Elvin Hajizada,Michael Neumeier,Edward Paxon Frady,Yulia Sandamirskaya,Axel von Arnim,Bing Li,Eyke Hüllermeier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CLANE是首个部署在Intel Loihi 2神经形态芯片上的事件相机动作识别持续学习系统，在THU E-ACT-50数据集上达到70.4%准确率，相比边缘GPU基线实现100倍以上能效提升和16倍延迟降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AR/VR和机器人应用需要在不遗忘旧知识的情况下持续学习新动作，同时要求设备端处理和学习以保证隐私和低延迟。事件相机虽能实现高效视觉感知，但尚无系统在神经形态硬件上部署持续学习流水线。

Method: CLANE结合了脉冲2D CNN进行时空特征提取，以及CLP-SNN作为片上学习头，通过时序聚合层和定点归一化层两个新颖的Loihi 2模块扩展到动作片段，实现了端到端部署。

Result: 在50类真实世界数据集THU E-ACT-50上，CLANE在持续学习任务中达到70.4%准确率，相比CNN+GRU+CLP边缘GPU基线实现100倍以上能耗降低和16倍延迟降低，经过跨平台基准验证。

Conclusion: CLANE证明了神经形态硬件结合事件相机在持续动作识别中的巨大优势，实现了极致的能效和延迟优化，为隐私保护的低功耗在线学习应用铺平了道路。

Abstract: Recognizing and continuously learning novel human actions without forgetting prior classes is a requirement for emerging AR/VR and robotics applications. For these applications, both on-device processing and learning are essential for privacy and low-latency adaptation. Event cameras address the efficiency of visual sensing with sparse, asynchronous output that is naturally compatible with neuromorphic processing. Yet no prior system has deployed a continual on-device learning pipeline for event-based action recognition using neuromorphic hardware. We present CLANE, Continual Learning of Actions on Neuromorphic Hardware from Event Cameras, deployed end-to-end on Intel Loihi 2. CLANE combines a spiking 2D CNN for spatiotemporal feature extraction with CLP-SNN as its on-chip learning head, extended to action clips via a Temporal Aggregation Layer and a fixed-point Normalization Layer, both novel Loihi 2 modules. On THU E-ACT-50, a 50-class dataset captured under real-world conditions, CLANE achieves 70.4% accuracy in a continual learning task while delivering more than 100x energy reduction and 16x lower latency over a sequential CNN+GRU+CLP edge GPU baseline, validated through iso-algorithm cross-platform benchmarking across three evaluation levels.

</details>


### [467] [Comparative Analysis of Liquid Neural Networks and LSTM for Sequential Pattern Recognition: Robustness, Efficiency, and Clinical Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27467)
*Ye Kyaw Thu,Thazin Myint Oo,Thepchai Supnithi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对液态神经网络（LNN/CfC）与RNN/LSTM在四种序列模态（神经形态事件数据、笔画绘图、手写、生理时间序列）上进行了基准测试，并引入时间丢弃法评估鲁棒性。结果表明LNN在参数效率和面对缺失数据的鲁棒性上显著优于传统模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RNN和LSTM基于离散时间步建模，难以捕捉真实物理过程的连续时间动态；亟需一种能连续建模隐状态演化的网络结构，并在多模态、尤其是稀疏数据场景下验证其优势。

Method: 1) 选取四种代表性序列任务（N-MNIST, QuickDraw, IAM, PhysioNet Sepsis-3）；2) 对比LNN (CfC) 与 RNN/LSTM；3) 引入时间丢弃法（temporal dropout）进行缺失数据鲁棒性压力测试。

Result: LNN在参数效率上始终优于传统模型，且在天然时间域和临床环境（数据稀疏常见）中展现出显著更高的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: LNN/CfC网络更适合处理连续时间动态和稀疏序列数据，为物理过程建模和临床预测等场景提供了更有竞争力的替代方案。

Abstract: Traditional Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) units operate on discrete time steps, often failing to capture the fluid temporal dynamics of real-world physical processes. Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs), specifically Closed-form Continuous-time (CfC) networks, address this by modeling the hidden state evolution as a continuous differential equation. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive benchmarking study across four distinct sequential modalities: neuromorphic event-based data (N-MNIST), stroke-based drawing (QuickDraw), visual handwriting (IAM), and physiological time-series (PhysioNet Sepsis-3). Furthermore, we perform a rigorous stress test using temporal dropout to evaluate model robustness against missing data. Our findings reveal that LNNs consistently provide superior parameter efficiency and significantly higher robustness in natively temporal domains and clinical environments where data sparsity is prevalent. This extended preprint provides additional background on related datasets and the LNN theoretical lineage, supplemented with a detailed appendix documenting our full implementation and experimental settings.

</details>


### [468] [BIRDNet: Mining and Encoding Boolean Implication Knowledge Graphs as Interpretable Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28739)
*Tirtharaj Dash*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BIRDNet是一种基于布尔蕴含关系（BIR）的稀疏神经网络架构，通过从表格数据中挖掘隐含规则来构建网络结构，在保持可解释性的同时大幅减少参数量（最多96倍），且在生物信息学基准测试中性能接近最强密集基线模型（AUROC差距≤0.02）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 知识密集型领域的表格数据通常蕴含特征间的布尔蕴含关系（BIRs）作为潜在先验，作者希望利用这种结构先验来构建既稀疏又可解释的神经网络，而不依赖外部知识库。

Method: 1) 使用稀疏异常二项检验挖掘特征对间的布尔蕴含关系；2) 将挖掘出的蕴含关系构建为有向图（等价于2-文字子句的命题规则库）；3) 将该图编码为分层神经网络的连接结构（BIRDNet），每个隐藏单元对应一条规则，只与两个特征相连；4) BIR层中最多仅2/d的权重被激活（d为输入维度）。

Result: 在6个转录组和蛋白质组基准测试中：BIRDNet的AUROC与最强密集基线差距≤0.02；参数量减少最多96倍；第一层规则能恢复多种癌症亚型和组织类型的已知生物学特征，包括典型扩增子、谱系定义共表达模块和免疫浸润标记物。

Conclusion: BIRDNet通过数据驱动的布尔蕴含关系挖掘实现了神经网络的稀疏化和可解释性，以微小的精度代价换取了极高的参数效率和生物学可解释性，在知识密集型表格数据领域具有应用价值。

Abstract: Tabular data in knowledge-rich domains often carries a latent prior in the form of Boolean implication relationships (BIRs) between pairs of features. We mine such relationships with a sparse-exception binomial test. The mined implications form a typed directed graph, equivalent to a propositional rule base of 2-literal clauses. We encode this graph as the connectivity of a layered neural network, called BIRDNet, in which each hidden unit corresponds to one mined rule and binds only to its two features. We show two consequences of this design: First, the architecture is sparse by construction: at most $2/d$ of the weights in each BIR layer are active, where $d$ is the input dimension. Second, the model is interpretable: every trained unit keeps a stable symbolic identity, so rules can be read off the network without surrogate models. Unlike most neurosymbolic models, BIRDNet does not consume an external rule base; its structural prior is mined from the data. We evaluate BIRDNet on six transcriptomic and proteomic benchmarks. Our results show that BIRDNet stays within 0.02 AUROC of the strongest dense baseline, at a small accuracy cost, while using up to $96\times$ fewer active parameters than an architecture-matched dense MLP. First-layer rules recover known biological signatures across multiple cancer subtypes and tissue types, including canonical amplicons, lineage-defining co-expression modules, and immune-infiltration markers. Data and code are available at: https://github.com/MAHI-Group/BIRDNet.

</details>


### [469] [Architecture-driven Shift: towards a lightweight selector for capturing the trends of logit shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27469)
*Zhong Ye,Yu Hu,Ruilin Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Architecture-driven Shift (ADS)指标，通过解耦架构依赖和数据依赖来高效评估预训练模型在持续学习中的logit偏移，从而无需高计算成本即可进行模型选择。实验证明ADS与logit偏移存在强单调相关（最小Spearman's rs=0.731），并可作为期望校准误差的轻量级代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在持续学习中选择预训练模型时，logit偏移是衡量"可塑性-稳定性"平衡的自然代理，但获取logit偏移计算成本高昂。现有理论分析因假设均匀隐藏层宽度而无法处理真实架构的异构性（可变宽度和深度），亟需一个高效且理论上合理的替代方案。

Method: 将logit偏移解耦为架构依赖和数据依赖两部分，定义ADS指标。基于三个机制组件推导：权重矩阵梯度的谱范数与层宽度的缩放关系、新任务的优化路径长度、宽网络中的渐近任务冲突。仅需少量数据样本即可计算ADS。

Result: 在超过175种不同架构上的实验表明，ADS与logit偏移之间存在强单调相关性（最弱Spearman's rs=0.731）。ADS可作为期望校准误差（ECEs）的轻量级代理，在三个数据集、六种场景下验证有效。

Conclusion: ADS是一个高效且理论上合理的指标，能够以极低计算成本替代logit偏移用于持续学习中的预训练模型选择，弥补了现有理论无法处理异构架构的空白。

Abstract: Continual Learning (CL) is a practical paradigm to utilize power of deep pre-trained neural networks, but which pre-trained model has a better ability to balance ``Plasticity-Stability", deserving to be chosen? The logit shift serves as a natural proxy because it represents the logit shift in CL scenarios. However, obtaining the logit shift requires huge computational cost, which hinders large-scale model selection. Existing theoretical analyses fail to offer an efficient alternative because of the assumption of uniform hidden layer widths, which ignores the structural heterogeneity (variable width and depth) of real-world architectures. This raises a critical question: what theoretically relationship can be identified between heterogeneous architecture and logit shift on prior tasks (that the model has been trained on)? To answer the question, we decouple logit shift into architecture dependency and data dependency to establish our framework, which reveals that the combination of two dependency, defined as Architecture-driven Shift (ADS), that can capture the logit shift tendency well computable with few data samples. Specifically, for a well-optimized model on prior tasks, higher ADS is associated with a larger logit shift after training on the current task, which derived based on three mechanistic components: (1) spectral norm scaling of weight matrix gradients with layer width, (2) the optimization path length of the new task, and (3) the asymptotic task conflict in wide networks. Extensive empirical results across more than 175 diverse architectures demonstrate a strong monotonic correlation (the weakest Spearman's $r_s=0.731$) between ADS and logit shift. Practically, we demonstrate that ADS can serve as a lightweight proxy of the expected calibration error, which is a widely used metric for reliable CL model selection, on three datasets across six scenarios.

</details>


### [470] [Detect by Yourself: Self-Designing Agentic Workflows for Few-Shot Graph Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27470)
*Tairan Huang,Qiang Chen,Yili Wang,Yueyue Ma,Changlong He,Xiu Su,Yi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SignGAD框架，将图异常检测从固定管道转变为任务条件检测工作流，通过自设计代理工作流和受控最终重拟合策略，在少量监督下实现强性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图异常检测方法面临两个关键挑战：1) 固定管道限制了不同图任务下的适应性；2) 弱证据无法显式整合上下文和结构异常信号。

Method: 提出SignGAD框架，包括：1) 将异常检测任务重构为设计任务条件检测工作流，选择合适图编码和检测器设计；2) 引入受控最终重拟合策略，通过校准重拟合接受度来优化选定工作流。

Result: 在多个真实数据集上，SignGAD优于现有最先进方法，证明了其有效性。

Conclusion: SignGAD通过自设计代理工作流范式，有效解决了固定管道和弱证据两大挑战，在少量监督下实现了强大的图异常检测性能。

Abstract: Graph anomaly detection aims to identify anomaly nodes in attributed graphs and plays an important role in real-world applications. However, existing graph anomaly detection methods still face two key challenges: 1) fixed pipelines, which restrict their adaptability across different graph tasks under limited supervision; 2) weak evidence, which prevents them from explicitly incorporating contextual and structural anomaly signals into the detection process. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, self-designing agentic workflows for few-shot graph anomaly detection (SignGAD). Specifically, we propose a novel paradigm that reformulates graph anomaly detection task from training a fixed anomaly detector to designing task-conditioned detection workflows. By constructing detection workflows, SignGAD selects suitable graph encodings and detector designs to exploit task-specific anomaly evidence. Meanwhile, we introduce a guarded final refit strategy to refine the selected workflow by calibrating refit acceptance, enhancing reliability under limited supervision. Extensive experiments conducted on several real-world datasets demonstrate that SignGAD achieves strong performance against state-of-the-art methods, highlighting its effectiveness on graph anomaly detection tasks.

</details>


### [471] [HEAL: Resilient and Self-* Hub-based Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27475)
*Mohamed Amine Legheraba,Stefan Galkiewicz,Maria Gradinariu Potop-Butucaru,Sébastien Tixeuil*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HEAL框架，一种结合联邦学习、八卦学习和流行病学习优势的跨层去中心化学习框架，利用Elevator算法动态选择聚合节点，在保持完全去中心化和容错性的同时，性能接近联邦学习，且在节点崩溃和变动环境下优于八卦学习和流行病学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习存在单点故障、服务器脆弱性和可扩展性问题；而完全去中心化的八卦学习和流行病学习虽然鲁棒性强，但模型收敛速度慢。需要一种兼顾去中心化优势和训练效率的新型学习框架。

Method: 提出HEAL框架，这是首个跨层去中心化学习框架。利用Elevator算法动态选择节点作为聚合器，构建自组织和自修复的P2P覆盖网络，融合联邦学习、八卦学习和流行病学习的优势。

Result: 在无崩溃环境中，HEAL性能与联邦学习相当；在节点崩溃和高变动环境中，HEAL性能优于八卦学习和流行病学习。

Conclusion: HEAL成功实现了完全去中心化与良好性能的平衡，兼具联邦学习的高效性和完全去中心化方法的容错性与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Decentralized learning enhances privacy, scalability, and fault tolerance by distributing data and computation across nodes. A popular approach is Federated learning, which relies on a central aggregator, yet faces challenges such as server vulnerabilities, scalability issues, privacy risks and most importantly, the single point of failure. Alternatively Gossip Learning and Epidemic Learning offer fully decentralization through peer-to-peer exchanges of model updates, ensuring robustness and privacy, at the price of slower model convergence. In this work, we introduce a novel decentralized learning framework called HEAL. HEAL is the first cross-layer decentralized learning framework that exploits an optimized self-organizing and self-healing underlying P2P overlay combining the strengths of Federated Learning, Gossip and Epidemic Learning. Leveraging the recently proposed Elevator algorithm, HEAL promotes dynamically chosen nodes to act as aggregators. Through simulations, we demonstrate that HEAL has similar performances to that of Federated Learning in crash-free settings, while being fully decentralized and fault-tolerant. In crash and churn prone environments HEAL outperforms Gossip and Epidemic Learning.

</details>


### [472] [Balancing Fidelity and Diversity in Diffusion Models via Symmetric Attention Decomposition: Hopfield Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27476)
*Hyunmin Cho,Woo Kyoung Han,Kyong Hwan Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过分解注意力矩阵为对称与斜对称部分，分别解释为能量景观与循环驱动力，并基于此提出Hopfield-style稳定性度量，用于调控生成任务中的保真度-多样性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究忽视了注意力矩阵内部结构（对称与斜对称成分）在记忆检索与生成过程中的不同作用，缺乏对稳定性与生成权衡的定量理解。

Method: 将预Softmax注意力矩阵分解为对称部分（控制能量景观结构）和斜对称部分（驱动循环流动）；借用Hopfield网络能量视角推导稳定性度量。

Result: 发现Hopfield-style稳定性度量与生成中的保真度-多样性权衡存在显著相关性；通过调节斜对称部分（循环流动）可控制该权衡。

Conclusion: 注意力矩阵的对称/斜对称分解提供了一种可解释且可控的方法来调节生成模型的保真度与多样性。

Abstract: We characterize the pre-softmax attention matrix $\mathbf{QK^\top}$ in transformers as an associative memory matrix encoding pairwise associations between input features. By decomposing this matrix into its symmetric and skew-symmetric parts, we interpret the symmetric component as governing the structure of the energy landscape, and the skew-symmetric component as driving circulation on that landscape. Leveraging the energy formulation induced by the symmetric component, we derive Hopfield-style stability measures that quantify the stability of retrieved features. We observe meaningful correlations between Hopfield-style stability measures and the fidelity-diversity trade-offs in generation. Finally, we propose a controllable knob to modulate this trade-off by modifying the circulation of the underlying dynamics. Code is available at our GitHub (https://github.com/hyeon-cho/Attention-Symmetric-Decomposition).

</details>


### [473] [Resource-Constrained Affect Modelling via Variance Regularisation Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27479)
*Kosmas Pinitas,Konstantinos Katsifis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出方差正则化剪枝（VR）框架，在模型剪枝过程中引入跨参与者稳定性，在80%稀疏度下仍保持竞争性CCC性能，适用于资源受限的情感计算系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型剪枝方法仅优化稀疏性，未考虑参数移除对跨个体鲁棒性的影响，导致模型在不同用户间表现不稳定。

Method: 提出Variance-Regularised Pruning (VR)框架，在剪枝过程中不仅考虑平均预测误差，还评估每个连接对预测准确性和跨用户变异性的联合贡献，优先保留在不同分布下仍然可靠的参数。

Result: 在AGAIN数据集（包含9种游戏环境的情感唤醒度标注）上，VR在80%稀疏度下无需额外微调仍能保持竞争性的CCC性能。

Conclusion: VR框架支持开发紧凑且鲁棒的情感模型，可在资源受限的真实交互环境中可靠运行。

Abstract: Affective computing systems are increasingly embedded in pervasive and interactive environments, such as adaptive games, assistive technologies, and resource-constrained platforms, where computational efficiency must be balanced with reliability across diverse users. Model pruning offers an effective way to reduce computational demands, yet existing approaches typically optimise for sparsity alone, without accounting for how parameter removal impacts robustness across individuals. In this work, we introduce Variance-Regularised Pruning (VR), a pruning framework that explicitly incorporates cross-participant stability into the sparsification process. Rather than relying solely on average prediction error, VR evaluates each connection based on its joint contribution to both prediction accuracy and variability across users, prioritising parameters that remain reliable under distributional differences. We evaluate the proposed approach on the AGAIN dataset, which includes arousal annotations collected across nine affect-eliciting game environments. Experimental results demonstrate that VR maintains competitive Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) performance even at 80\% sparsity without additional fine-tuning, highlighting its suitability for deployment in real-world, resource-limited affect-aware systems. Overall, the proposed framework supports the development of compact, robust affective models that can operate reliably in real-world interactive environments.

</details>


### [474] [Energy-Structured Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27482)
*Longhua Li,Lei Qi,Qi Tian,Xin Geng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出E²-LoRA方法，通过将知识集中排序到主秩方向，并设计动态秩分配策略，解决持续学习中正交子空间方法的能量扩散和容量耗尽问题，实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 正交子空间方法在持续学习中存在基向量间能量扩散问题，导致知识压缩效率低、任务容量易耗尽，亟需更紧凑的知识表示方法。

Method: 1) 理论证明参数更新引起的输出特征漂移本质上是低秩的，沿主方向保留参数可最小化重构误差；2) 提出能量集中与排序的低秩适应（E²-LoRA），将知识显式排序并集中到前导秩；3) 设计动态秩分配策略，联合优化能量保留与模型可塑性以平衡稳定性-可塑性。

Result: 在多个持续学习基准上达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: E²-LoRA通过能量集中排序和动态秩分配有效解决了正交子空间方法的能量扩散问题，为后续任务释放了容量，实现了更优的持续学习效果。

Abstract: While orthogonal subspace methods try to mitigate task interference in Continual Learning (CL), they often suffer from energy diffusion across the basis, hindering knowledge compaction and exhausting capacity for future tasks. We observe that output feature drift induced by parameter updates is inherently low-rank, and theoretically prove that preserving parameters along the principal directions of this drift minimizes the output reconstruction error. Motivated by this, we propose \textbf{E}nergy-Concentrated and \textbf{E}nergy-Ordered \textbf{Lo}w-\textbf{R}ank \textbf{A}daptation (E$^2$-LoRA). By explicitly ordering and concentrating knowledge into leading ranks, E$^2$-LoRA frees capacity for subsequent tasks. Furthermore, we design a dynamic rank allocation strategy to balance stability and plasticity by jointly optimizing energy retention and model plasticity. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that E$^2$-LoRA achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [475] [Federated Learning for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection in Industrial Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27486)
*Khayyam Nosrati,Martin Uray,Saverio Messineo,Olaf Sassnick,Stefan Huber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对联邦学习框架下多变量时间序列异常检测面临的数据集挑战（规模不足、标签不准确、存在缺陷），提出一个具有循环动态特性的新数据集，并评估了多种检测方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据集无法同时满足联邦学习异常检测所需的规模、准确标签和无缺陷要求，且离散工业自动化中常见的循环过程行为在MTSAD研究中未被充分探索。

Method: 构建了包含离散自动化过程循环动态特性的新数据集，并在该数据集和公开基准数据集上评估了多种多变量时间序列异常检测方法。

Result: 提出了新数据集并完成了对多个MTSAD方法的评估比较。

Conclusion: 新数据集弥补了联邦学习异常检测领域的数据空白，揭示了循环过程行为对异常检测的重要性，为未来研究提供了基准。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) has broadened the horizon for multivariate time series anomaly detection (MTSAD). However, benchmarking such anomaly detection methods within FL paradigm poses data-centric challenges. The existing datasets do not counteract these challenges since they do not simultaneously provide sufficient scale, accurate labels, and freedom from common flaws. In addition, the role of cyclic process behavior, which is common in discrete industrial automation, remains underexplored for MTSAD for the current state of research. This paper aims to shed more light on the literature and address these gaps by introducing a dataset designed with cyclic dynamics arising from the repetitive nature of discrete automation processes and evaluates selected MTSAD methods on both the proposed dataset and a public benchmark dataset.

</details>


### [476] [GenSBI: Generative Methods for Simulation-Based Inference in JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27499)
*Aurelio Amerio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GenSBI是一个基于JAX的开源库，将流匹配、分数匹配和去噪扩散等生成模型统一用于基于仿真的推理（SBI），提供三种transformer架构（包括新的Flux1Joint用于联合密度估计），并支持后验校准，在标准基准上达到接近理想的C2ST分数（0.50-0.56）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的SBI库大多基于PyTorch，而许多研究人员的前向模型和分析流程基于JAX开发，缺乏原生的JAX选项。

Method: 基于JAX实现流匹配、分数匹配和去噪扩散三种生成方法，提供三种transformer架构（SimFormer、Flux1、新型Flux1Joint），通过统一接口解耦生成方法、神经网络主干和推理模式，支持后验校准（SBC、TARP、LC2ST）和自定义架构。

Result: 在标准SBI基准SBIBM任务上，以最小的每任务调优实现了接近理想的平均C2ST分数（0.50-0.56，理想值为0.50），所有配置下后验覆盖均良好校准。

Conclusion: GenSBI为JAX生态提供了原生SBI解决方案，统一了多种生成方法并保持高度模块化与可扩展性。

Abstract: Flow and diffusion generative models have established themselves as widely adopted density estimators for simulation-based inference (SBI), extending naturally from neural posterior estimation to likelihood and joint density estimation. Their principled optimization objectives and freedom from architectural constraints have driven rapid adoption across the natural sciences. Yet the most widely used SBI libraries remain PyTorch-based, leaving researchers who develop their forward models and analysis pipelines in JAX without a native option. We present GenSBI, an open-source library that implements flow matching, score matching, and denoising diffusion entirely in JAX. The library offers three transformer-based architectures - SimFormer, Flux1, and a novel Flux1Joint that extends gate-modulated transformer blocks to joint density estimation - all interchangeable through a unified interface that decouples generative method, neural backbone, and inference mode. GenSBI provides an end-to-end workflow from training through posterior calibration (SBC, TARP, LC2ST) and supports custom architectures with domain-specific embedding networks. We validate the framework on standard SBI benchmarks, achieving near-ideal mean C2ST scores (0.50-0.56, where 0.50 is ideal) on SBIBM tasks with minimal per-task tuning and well-calibrated posterior coverage across all tested configurations. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/aurelio-amerio/GenSBI.

</details>


### [477] [SparseOpt: Addressing Normalization-induced Gradient Skew in Sparse Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27541)
*Mohammed Adnan,Rohan Jain,Tom Jacobs,Ekansh Sharma,Rahul G. Krishnan,Rebekka Burkholz,Yani Ioannou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出动态稀疏训练（DST）因批归一化（BN）导致收敛缓慢，提出稀疏感知优化器SparseOpt，在ResNet模型上实现更快收敛和更好泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DST方法虽能减少计算量，但收敛速度显著慢于密集训练，训练时间相当。现有工作忽视了BN对稀疏训练的负面影响。

Method: 首先从理论和实验上证明BN会阻碍稀疏训练，随后提出稀疏感知优化器SparseOpt来缓解这一问题。

Result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet上使用ResNet模型，SparseOpt实现了更快的收敛速度和更好的泛化性能。

Conclusion: 揭示了BN与稀疏层及DST之间的交互影响，首次系统研究了这一问题，推动DST在实用性上接近密集训练。

Abstract: Dynamic Sparse Training (DST) methods train neural networks by maintaining sparsity while dynamically adapting the network topology. Despite the promise of reduced computation, DST methods converge significantly slower than dense training, often requiring comparable training time to achieve similar accuracy. We demonstrate both analytically and empirically that Batch Normalization (BN) adversely affects sparse training, and propose SparseOpt, a sparsity-aware optimizer, to address this. Experiments on ResNet models across CIFAR-100 and ImageNet demonstrate consistently faster convergence and improved generalization with our proposed method. Our work highlights the limitations of current normalization layers in sparse training and provides the first systematic study of the interaction between Batch Normalization, sparse layers, and DST, taking a significant step toward making DST practically competitive with dense training.

</details>


### [478] [The Fundamental Limits of Fraud Detection in Card Payment Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27557)
*Gaurav Dhama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文论证了支付欺诈检测之所以进展缓慢，其根本瓶颈不在于模型架构，而在于支付生态系统中固有的结构性信息缺陷（延迟、审查、污染、反事实缺失），并给出了理论 regret 下界证明信息质量比模型复杂度更关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管模型架构取得了重大进展，但信用卡欺诈检测的性能提升却一直停滞不前。作者认为这并非函数逼近或优化失败，而是支付生态系统本身存在结构性信息缺陷（feedback 延迟、审查、污染、反事实缺失），这些缺陷从根本上限制了学习效果。

Method: 将信用卡授权形式化为一个带延迟、审查、污染和反事实缺失反馈的序贯决策问题。推导了极小极大遗憾下界，证明这些信息缺陷以乘积形式出现在可达学习率的分母中。同时分析了发卡行异质性对可学习性的加剧效应。

Result: 推导出信息缺陷乘性放大 regret 下界的理论结果；表明提升发卡行报告质量或减少审查比增加模型复杂度更能降低 regret 下限；证明发卡行间的异质性会进一步恶化可学习性。

Conclusion: 欺诈检测在支付网络中的难度本质高于标准在线学习环境；生态系统信息质量是关键瓶颈；应优先投资于报告基础设施、争议处理流程和选择性探索策略，而非一味追求更复杂的模型。该理论不依赖专有交易数据。

Abstract: Card payment fraud detection is usually framed as a supervised classification problem. Although this approach has generated practical progress, improvement has remained incremental despite major advances in model architecture. We argue that this is not mainly a failure of function approximation or optimization, but a consequence of structural information impairments inherent to the payment ecosystem.
  We formalize card authorization as a sequential decision problem with delayed, censored, corrupted, and counterfactually missing feedback. We derive a minimax regret lower bound showing that these impairments enter multiplicatively in the denominator of the achievable learning rate. The bound implies that improving issuer reporting quality or reducing censorship can yield larger reductions in the regret floor than increasing model complexity. We also show that heterogeneity across issuers worsens learnability beyond what average impairment rates suggest.
  The paper contributes a theory of why fraud detection in payment networks is fundamentally harder than in standard online learning settings, identifies ecosystem information quality as the key bottleneck, and provides a theoretical basis for prioritizing investments in reporting infrastructure, dispute process quality, and selective exploration. The paper is theory-first and does not rely on proprietary transaction data.

</details>


### [479] [Information-theoretic Multimodal Representation Learning for Electrocardiogram Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27583)
*Phu X. Nguyen,Konstantinos Kontras,Wei Dai,Huy Phan,Christos Chatzichristos,Paul Pu Liang,Bert Vandenberk,Maarten De Vos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MERIT框架，通过信息论视角融合心电图信号结构与临床语义，采用掩码建模与对比学习联合预训练，在分类、零样本评估和文本生成任务上均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态心电图方法虽对齐了信号与临床报告，但临床报告无法保留心电图波形在不同抽象层次（从粗粒度诊断类别到细粒度形态）上的丰富生理结构。

Method: 从信息论角度推导可优化的目标函数，联合保留信号结构并整合临床语义；提出MERIT双分支预训练框架，结合掩码心电图建模与心电图-文本对比对齐。

Result: 在PTB-XL上分类F1提升超3%（All）和5%（SubClass）；零样本AUC和F1分别提升+2.66%和+2.11%；分布偏移下鲁棒；心电图引导的临床文本生成在ROUGE和METEOR等指标上提升。

Conclusion: MERIT能学习到更具信息量和临床意义的心电图表示，尤其适用于细粒度临床应用。

Abstract: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are widely used non-invasive measurements of cardiac activity and play a central role in clinical diagnosis. Recent multimodal approaches align ECG signals with clinical reports to incorporate diagnostic semantics, but clinical reports often fail to preserve the rich physiological structure of ECG waveforms, particularly across multiple levels of abstraction ranging from coarse diagnostic categories to fine-grained morphology. To address this limitation, we formulate ECG representation learning from an information-theoretic perspective and derive a tractable objective that jointly preserves signal structure and integrates clinical semantics. Based on this principle, we propose \textbf{MERIT} (Multimodal ECG Representation via Information Theory), a dual-branch pretraining framework combining masked ECG modeling with ECG--text contrastive alignment. Extensive experiments on PTB-XL and additional benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over prior methods, including gains exceeding $3%$ F1 on PTB-XL All and $5%$ F1 on SubClass classification. In zero-shot evaluation, MERIT further improves performance by up to $ +2.66\%$ AUC and $ +2.11\%$ F1 on PTB-XL SubClass, while also demonstrating robustness under multiple distribution-shift settings. Moreover, leveraging the learned ECG representations for ECG-conditioned clinical text generation with large language models improves text quality across several metrics, including ROUGE and METEOR. Together, these results demonstrate that MERIT learns more informative and clinically meaningful ECG representations, particularly for fine-grained clinical applications.

</details>


### [480] [Gradient Transformer: Learning to Generate Updates for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27591)
*Binh-Nguyen Nguyen,Khang Tran,NhatHai Phan,Issa Khalil*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于梯度变换器的无数据知识蒸馏框架，通过在私有数据上微调TinyLM生成更新向量，再用Grad-Transformer将其映射为LLM的更新向量，实现无需访问私有数据即可更新大模型，支持多组织协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多组织缺乏计算资源在大模型上进行微调，而小模型微调效果差；同时私有数据不能共享，导致大模型难以利用这些数据提升性能。

Method: 提出Grad-Transformer，一种将TinyLM微调产生的更新向量转换为LLM更新向量的神经网络；利用影子数据集捕捉两类模型更新向量之间的相关性；支持多组织联合更新大模型。

Result: 在语言建模和推理任务上，Grad-Transformer显著优于现有最先进的知识蒸馏方法，且在严格差分隐私保护下仍表现优异。

Conclusion: 该框架实现了无数据、隐私保护下的TinyLM到LLM知识迁移，有效降低了LLM微调的计算门槛，同时支持多组织协作场景。

Abstract: Many organizations lack computational resources to fine-tune large language models (LLMs) on private (unshareable) data for better utility, while fine-tuning tiny language models (TinyLMs) alone performs poorly. To address this bottleneck, we propose a data-free knowledge distillation framework that generates LLM update vectors based on TinyLMs fine-tuned on private data. An update vector is a vector of parameter changes from an initial model to its fine-tuned version on a dataset, capturing the effect of cumulative gradient steps during fine-tuning. The key idea of our framework is a novel Gradient Transformer that transforms TinyLM's update vectors into LLM's update vectors. As derived from shadow datasets, Grad-Transformer captures the correlation between TinyLM and LLM update vectors, enabling third-party providers to generate LLM update vectors given the organization's TinyLM update vectors without accessing the organization's private data. The framework supports multi-organization collaboration to jointly update LLMs, improving performance and cost-efficiency. Extensive experiments across language modeling and reasoning tasks show that Grad-Transformer remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art knowledge distillation baselines, even under strict differential privacy protection.

</details>


### [481] [The Energy Blind Spot: NVIDIA's Flagship Edge AI Hardware Cannot Support Process-Level Energy Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27599)
*Deepak Panigrahy,Aakash Tyagi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对ASUS Ascent GX10 (GB10 SoC)平台的能源可观测性审计发现，其除GPU瞬时功耗外没有任何CPU能耗暴露接口，尽管MediaTek固件内部已通过未公开的ACPI接口计算每轨能耗，但NVIDIA明确表示不计划公开CPU能耗信息。本文提出了面向能耗归因AI的硬件需求规范、外部直流计量+GPU减法的校准桥接方案，以及通过SCMI powercap的标准路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着Agentic AI工作负载向边缘部署（多家厂商2026年推出GB10桌面AI系统），能耗问题日益突出：编排结构导致能耗最高达线性基准的7.63倍，CPU侧处理占动态能耗44%。然而当前边缘AI平台缺乏必要的能耗可观测性，无法进行逐进程能耗归因（类似x86的RAPL），制约了低碳计算研究。

Method: 对ASUS Ascent GX10 (GB10 SoC)进行了系统性的能耗可观测性审计，检查了所有支持的软件接口（CPU能耗计数器、INA电源轨监控器、IPMI/BMC、SCMI powercap协议等），并发现了MediaTek固件内部通过未文档化的ACPI接口（SPBM）计算每轨能耗的事实。
